title: Almond Frosting
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 cups sugar
- 1 pound almonds

## Directions

1. Blanch almonds, pound them in a mortar with a little sugar, till a fine paste.
2. Beat eggs and fine white sugar to stiff icing, then add almond paste, mixing thoroughly.
3. Cover cake with thick coating of this and afterward with plain icing.

title: Angel Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 cup butter
- 1/4 cup flour
- 1 cup scalded milk
- 2 eggs
- 1/2 cup bread crumbs
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup boiling water
- 1/2 cup jelly or jam
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Cream butter and flour, stir into scalded milk
2. Cook until mixture boils
3. Beat eggs and sugar lightly and when well mixed add to the first mixture
4. To this add sifted bread crumbs, and flavor with any desired extract
5. Bake in well buttered patty pans
6. This is sufficient for five persons
7. Bake until the mixture is well set and browned
8. Place on serving dish, dust with powdered sugar, and serve with royal sauce
9. For sauce: Mix cornstarch and butter, add gradually boiling water and jelly or jam, and a little lemon juice if desired
10. If you use jam and the seeds are objectionable, strain before serving

title: Apple Custard Pie No. 1
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups milk
- 4 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 cups thick stewed apple
- nutmeg or cinnamon

## Directions

1. Strain thick stewed apples through a colander, add sugar.
2. Beat yolks lightly and mix with apple; flavor with nutmeg or cinnamon.
3. Beat into this the milk, and lastly the well beaten whites.
4. Bake with one crust and let that bake before putting in the filling.

title: Apple Custard Pie No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1 quart milk
- apples
- sugar to taste
- seasoning to taste

## Directions

1. Lay a crust on your pie plates, slice apples thin, and half fill plates.
2. Pour over them a custard made from eggs and milk, sweetened and seasoned to taste.

title: Apple Float
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 2 grated apples
- custard

## Directions

1. Beat the whites of eggs until very light
2. Add powdered sugar and beat until fine and dry
3. Into this grate two apples, beating carefully until the meringue will hold no more apples
4. Spread this over a soft custard or whipped cream
5. Serve at once

title: Apple Johnny Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- 1 cup cornmeal
- 2/3 cup flour
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 4 apples

## Directions

1. Sift together dry ingredients, add butter and milk, and apples cut finely; stir well and bake quickly.

title: Apple Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can apples
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- cinnamon
- butter

## Directions

1. Slice apples into lower crust, sprinkle a tablespoon of sugar over each, a little cinnamon and some slices of butter, a very little juice.
2. Cover with upper crust and bake.

title: Apple Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1/4 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup milk
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 can apples
- cinnamon
- sugar
- butter

## Directions

1. Place canned apples with their juice or partly cooked fresh apples in baking pan
2. Sprinkle with cinnamon, sugar, and dot with butter
3. Make cake batter
4. pour over apples and bake half an hour
5. Serve with any desired sauce

title: Apple Puff
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup milk
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- flour for stiff batter
- 1 can apples
- cinnamon or nutmeg or sliced lemon

## Directions

1. Put apples over the fire in a pudding dish, and wash, sweeten and flavor to taste
2. Cinnamon, nutmeg or sliced lemon are good
3. Let them cook while the oven heats
4. get together sugar, butter, milk, enough flour to make a nice, ordinary cake batter, and lastly the baking powder
5. Be sure the apples have quite an amount of juice
6. Spread the batter over the boiling apple sauce
7. Bake and serve with any kind of pudding sauce

title: Apricot Delicate Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup apricot juice
- 1 cup water
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 3 tablespoons corn starch
- 4 eggs (whites)
- 4 eggs (yolks)
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 2 cups milk
- salt
- flavor to taste

## Directions

1. Place fruit juice and water on stove
2. When hot, add corn starch dissolved in cold water
3. Stir until entirely cooked
4. Add a pinch of salt
5. Add stiff froth of whites of eggs
6. Stir up well from the bottom
7. Place on back of stove and turn over and over to make the whites of the eggs a little solid
8. Put some of this mixture in the mould then a layer of the solid fruit and so on until the mixture is used
9. Place on ice
10. Serve with yellow sauce made of milk, eggs yolks, sugar and flavoring to taste

title: Apricot Meringue Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can apricots
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon sugar

## Directions

1. Cut the apricots fine and mix them with half a cup of sugar and the beaten yolk of an egg.
2. Fill the crust and bake.
3. Take from the oven; let stand a few minutes, cover with meringue made from white of egg and one tablespoon of sugar.
4. Bake in a slow oven until golden brown.

title: Arroz a la Valenciana
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- 2 cups rice
- 1 cup stewed tomatoes
- 1 large onion
- a few cloves of garlic if liked
- 1 small can peas
- 1 small can pimiento
- 3 hard-boiled eggs
- 6 tablespoons lard
- salt and pepper to taste
- boiling water

## Directions

1. Sort, wash and soak the rice in water for one hour.
2. Dress and joint chicken with salt and pepper and fry until light brown.
3. Remove the chicken from frying pan, saute minced onion and bruised garlic until clear and tender.
4. Add the tomato, fried chicken and just enough boiling water to moisten and steam the rice.
5. Add the rice, and chopped pimiento and cook slowly until the rice is done.
6. Watch closely to prevent burning.
7. Add peas ten minutes before dishing.
8. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
9. Serve the mixture on a hot platter, garnished with slices of hard-boiled eggs.

title: Asparagus Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 2/3 can asparagus
- 1 pint scalded milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Cook asparagus until very tender
2. Rub through strainer
3. Add this to scalded milk
4. Rub flour and butter together and stir into the milk
5. Cook up
6. Season with salt and pepper
7. Serve

title: Aunt Lizzie's Spice Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar (half brown)
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup molasses (black, full cup)
- 3 eggs (leave out 1 white)
- 3/4 cup sweet milk
- 3 rounding teaspoons baking powder
- 3/8 teaspoon soda
- 2 3/4 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 3/4 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1/4 cup strong coffee (if wished)
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 cup raisins

## Directions

1. Combine ingredients
2. Bake

title: Bachelor's Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound stale bread
- 3/4 pound beef suet
- 2 large apples
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 3/4 cups sugar
- 1 lemon
- 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Take grated stale bread, suet chopped fine, apples cut fine, baking powder, sugar, the juice and grated rind of lemon, and well beaten eggs
2. mix well, adding eggs last
3. Boil four hours in a well buttered and sugared bowl

title: Baked Apple Dumplings
body:
## Ingredients

- rich, short biscuit dough
- four quarters of an apple per dumpling
- sugar
- cinnamon
- butter
- sugar
- boiling water

## Directions

1. Make a rich, short biscuit dough
2. Take piece of dough, roll out thin as pie crust
3. Put in each piece of dough four quarters of an apple
4. sprinkle on a spoonful of sugar, a pinch of cinnamon
5. turn in the ends of the dough over the apple and lap tight
6. Lay dumplings on dripping pan, well buttered, the smooth side up
7. When the pans are filled, put small piece of butter on top of each
8. sprinkle over a large handful of sugar
9. turn in cupful of boiling water
10. then place in moderate oven for three-quarters of an hour
11. Baste with liquor once while baking
12. Serve with hard sauce

title: Baked Bananas
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 bananas
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 1 tablespoon lime or lemon juice

## Directions

1. Peel and cut bananas into halves lengthwise
2. Place slices in a shallow granite pan
3. Melt the butter and stir in sugar and lime or lemon juice
4. Pour one-half of this mixture over the bananas
5. Place the pan in a slow oven and bake twenty minutes
6. While baking, baste the bananas occasionally with the remainder of the syrup mixture

title: Baked Brown Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 5 tablespoons molasses
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 1½ cups bran or graham flour
- 1 cup white flour
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1½ cups seeded raisins

## Directions

1. Sift together bran or graham flour and white flour.
2. Add flour mixture to liquid.
3. Sift soda into raisins; add raisins to bread mixture.
4. Bake in moderate oven fifty-five minutes.

title: Baked Eggplant
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large eggplant
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 3 large ripe tomatoes
- 3/4 cup cooked rice
- 1 beaten egg
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Pare the eggplant, cut into slices and steam until soft
2. Scald and peel tomatoes, press them through a sieve
3. Mix all the ingredients together, season and bake in a well greased dish

title: Baked Fish
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- rolled cracker or stale bread crumbs
- butter
- pepper
- salt
- sage

## Directions

1. Fill the fish with a nicely prepared stuffing of rolled cracker or stale bread crumbs, seasoned with butter, pepper, salt, sage, etc.
2. Sew up
3. Bake fish slowly, basting often with butter and water

title: Baked Fish with Dressing Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- 4 hard boiled eggs, chopped fine
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- salt and pepper to taste
- pinch of parsley
- chopped onion
- 4 eggs, hard boiled
- 3/4 cup vinegar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Clean and dry well, and fill with dressing
2. Tie well with cord to keep the dressing in
3. Put in baking pan with a little water; keep moist while cooking by basting
4. When done put on a platter and clip the string
5. Make a sauce of eggs, vinegar, butter, pepper and salt
6. Let it cook until thick and then pour over the fish

title: Baked Kidney Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 kilo kidney beans
- 2/10 kilo fat salt pork
- 1/2 cup molasses
- 1 small onion
- salt
- water

## Directions

1. Wash thoroughly kidney or red beans
2. Soak over night
3. Drain and cover with boiling water and boil thirty minutes
4. Drain and season to taste with salt, molasses, and one small onion if desired
5. Add fat salt pork, and enough boiling water to come to top of beans but not to cover
6. Place in tireless with two very hot disks and bake from four to six hours

title: Baked Rice
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups cooked rice
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup cheese
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 pint milk
- 1/2 tablespoon salt

## Directions

1. Mix well rice, cheese in small bits, milk, eggs, butter and salt.
2. Place in baking dish with cheese and a little butter on top.
3. Bake half an hour.

title: Baked Squash
body:
## Ingredients

- squash
- butter

## Directions

1. Cut open the squash; take out the seeds and without paring cut into large pieces.
2. Place in a moderately hot oven and bake about an hour.
3. When done, serve the pieces hot, to be eaten with butter like sweet potatoes.

title: Baked Sweet Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 sweet potatoes
- 1/2 cup boiling water
- sugar
- butter

## Directions

1. Have boiled three large sweet potatoes with their jackets on; when done, remove the skins and slice into a baking dish.
2. Sprinkle sugar and small pieces of butter over the potatoes and pour over all one half cup boiling water.
3. Bake a light brown.

title: Bamboo Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- bamboo sprouts
- 3 potatoes, cooked
- 1 onion
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Scrape the inside of bamboo sprouts very fine.
2. Put in boiling water and cook half an hour.
3. When it is done remove and drain.
4. Have ready three or four potatoes sliced or diced and some minced onion.
5. Mix all together and add mayonnaise, if desired, or other salad dressing.

title: Bamboo Shoots
body:
## Ingredients

- fresh crisp shoot
- cold water

## Directions

1. Select a fresh crisp shoot
2. Cut into thin slices, then into small pieces
3. Soak in cold water four hours, changing the water twice
4. Put into cold water and allow it to come to a boil
5. Pour off the water and boil for ten minutes
6. Change the water again and boil until tender
7. Unless the water is changed many times, the bamboo is bitter

title: Bamboo Sprouts
body:
## Ingredients

- bamboo sprouts from a few inches to a foot high
- water or coconut milk
- bacon or dry meat (optional)
- butter, salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Remove the outside of the bamboo sprouts
2. Take the inside and scrape very fine or cut into very thin slices
3. Put into boiling water or coconut milk and boil thirty or forty minutes
4. If liked, bacon or any dry meat can be boiled with it, or it can be served with butter, salt and pepper

title: Banana and Peanut Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 bananas
- 1 egg
- salted peanuts

## Directions

1. Peel bananas.
2. Dip in white of egg and roll in chopped salted nuts.
3. Serve on lettuce.

title: Banana Custard
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 ripe bananas
- 1 pint cold custard
- lemon flavoring
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Wash very ripe bananas
2. Rub through a sieve
3. Add to a pint of cold custard
4. Flavor with lemon
5. Serve in glasses with a tablespoon of whipped cream on top of each

title: Banana Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- desired amount of bananas
- sufficient sugar

## Directions

1. Cut fine the desired amount of bananas, mix thoroughly with sufficient sugar to make paste that will spread well, and place between the layers.
2. Cover the cake with boiled icing, and if to be served soon, lay long pieces of banana on top.

title: Banana Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cans cream
- 5 large cups water
- 5 eggs
- Vanilla
- Bananas
- 4 cups sugar
- 2 tablespoons flour

## Directions

1. Boil flour in water
2. Beat together eggs and sugar
3. Mix with cream and when cool add vanilla and bananas cut fine
4. Freeze

title: Banana Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 bananas
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 1 pint milk
- vanilla
- 3 tablespoons sugar

## Directions

1. Put milk into vessel to boil.
2. Mix egg yolks, cup of sugar, butter and flour; beat mixture well and add to boiling milk.
3. Cook until real thick.
4. Set off to cool and flavor with vanilla.
5. Make a rich crust and bake.
6. Slice bananas in the crust and pour custard over them.
7. Beat the egg whites until stiff with three tablespoons sugar.
8. Spread on the pie and brown.

title: Banana Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- stale cake
- sliced bananas
- boiled custard

## Directions

1. Cut cake in thin slices and line a dish with slices
2. Cover the cake with bananas sliced very thin
3. Over this pour a cupful of thin, boiled custard
4. Make another layer of cake, banana and custard
5. Set away to cool

title: Banana Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- bananas
- peas
- chopped nuts
- chopped parsley
- mayonnaise
- walnuts

## Directions

1. Peel large bananas; scoop out centers, making them boat shaped, and fill with the following mixture.
2. Mix small peas, chopped nuts, chopped parsley and the banana which was taken from the center with stiff mayonnaise.
3. Place half kernels of walnuts and sprigs of parsley on top.

title: Bean and Potato Puff
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 3/4 cups bean pulp
- 1 cup mashed potato
- 1/2 cup bread crumbs
- 1 beaten egg
- 3/4 small onion
- salt and pepper to taste
- parsley

## Directions

1. Blend all the ingredients
2. Season with pepper and salt
3. Drop by spoonfuls on a greased tin
4. Bake in a moderately quick oven until puffy and brown
5. Turn on a platter and garnish with parsley

title: Beef a la Mode
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 pounds round of beef
- 3/4 pound fat salt pork
- 6 small fresh carrots
- 6 peppercorns
- 3/4 pound suet
- 2 bay leaves
- 1/4 teaspoon mace
- 2 small onions
- 2 tablespoons cider vinegar

## Directions

1. Have butcher skewer beef and tie the roll with stout twine.
2. Make five or six incisions and thread them with salt pork, carrots, peppercorns, mace, onions and bay leaves.
3. Pour over all two tablespoons cider vinegar.
4. Cover the vessel and let stand all night in a cool place.
5. By morning the seasoning will have permeated the meat.
6. Then cook as a pot roast.
7. Pour off the juice that has drawn during the night and start roasting with small piece of suet.
8. When this is sizzling hot, put in meat with more suet, and after the meat has browned on both sides, add little by little the juice.
9. Simmer slowly until the meat is tender and let it cool in remaining juice.
10. Serve cold with hominy boiled very dry.

title: Beef Loaf
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds lean beef
- 1 dozen butter crackers
- 4 eggs beaten
- 1 tablespoon black pepper
- 1 tablespoon salt
- butter size of an egg

## Directions

1. Chop beef finely.
2. Add crackers, eggs beaten, pepper, salt and butter.
3. Mix thoroughly, mould into two bricks, and bake like a roast.

title: Beef Loaf
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds lean beef
- 1 dozen butter crackers
- 4 eggs
- 1 tablespoon black pepper
- 1 tablespoon salt
- butter size of an egg

## Directions

1. Chop beef finely.
2. Add crackers, eggs beaten, pepper, salt and butter.
3. Mix thoroughly, mould into two bricks, and bake like a roast.
4. Slice cold for serving. A very little sage may be added, if desired.

title: Beefsteak
body:
## Ingredients

- beefsteak
- butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Have the frying pan very hot.
2. Rub over the bottom with a rag dipped in butter.
3. Place your steak in pan.
4. Turn, season with salt, pepper and butter.

title: Beefsteak Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- sirloin
- 1 onion
- mushrooms, or oysters, or kidneys
- few slices bacon
- salt and pepper
- cold water

## Directions

1. Chop the flank end of the sirloin rather coarsely.
2. Cover with cold water and simmer until the juice is extracted, adding more water if necessary.
3. Cut the tenderloin into thin slices crosswise.
4. Rub the slices with the cut side of an onion, if desired, and dust with a very little pepper.
5. Roll the slices and put a layer of them into a small buttered baking dish.
6. Add some tiny pieces of bacon and a few mushrooms.
7. Pour some of the broth around the meat.
8. Add pepper and salt; then another layer of beef rolls and the rest of the broth.
9. Cover with crust.
10. Bake 45 minutes.

title: Beefsteak with Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- beefsteak
- 1 dozen onions
- beef drippings or butter

## Directions

1. Have ready in a frying pan a dozen onions cut in slices and fried brown in a little beef drippings or butter.
2. Dish your steak and lay the onions thickly over the top.

title: Beefsteak with Oysters
body:
## Ingredients

- beefsteak
- 1 quart oysters
- 3 ounces butter
- 1 tablespoon sifted flour

## Directions

1. Put oysters with very little of the juice into stew-pan.
2. When they come to a boil, remove the scum.
3. Stir in butter mixed with flour.
4. Let boil one minute until it thickens.
5. Pour over the steak.
6. Serve hot.

title: Best Candy Ever
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 3/4 cups golden color corn syrup
- 2 eggs
- 1/4 cups water
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 3/4 cup walnuts
- 1/2 cup dates or figs

## Directions

1. Boil sugar, syrup and water until it becomes crisp when dropped in water.
2. Beat the whites of eggs very stiff.
3. Pour the syrup slowly into the eggs and beat until it begins to harden.
4. Add vanilla, nuts and dates or figs which have been cut in small pieces with sharp scissors.
5. Spread rather thick upon a buttered platter, and cut into squares.

title: Biscuit Glacé
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint sweet cream
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- Yolks of 4 eggs
- Vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat cream stiff; beat egg yolks, then cream with sugar and pour into tin
2. Flavor with vanilla and freeze

title: Biscuits
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 teaspoon salt
- cream
- water

## Directions

1. Take flour, baking powder, salt and butter.
2. Mix up soft dough with one part cream to two of water.
3. Roll out to the desired thickness, kneading as little as possible.

title: Black Angel Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 2 cups flour
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup milk
- 2 scant teaspoons soda
- 1/2 cup milk
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 cup grated chocolate
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. While this is warm, stir in first mixture

title: Black Bean Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint black beans
- 1 quart cold water
- 1 small onion
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 saltspoon pepper
- 1 saltspoon cayenne
- 1 lemon
- 2 eggs
- 1 quart beef stock

## Directions

1. Soak the beans over night in cold water
2. In the morning, drain off and put in a sauce pan with cold water
3. Add the onion and cook until soft
4. Mash through colander
5. Add the beef stock, salt and pepper
6. Slice hard-boiled eggs and lemon
7. Place one slice lemon and eggs as desired to each plate of soup

title: Boiled Beets
body:
## Ingredients

- beets
- water
- butter
- salt
- pepper
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Wash carefully
2. Do not cut or pierce
3. Put in boiling water, and boil until tender, from one to two hours
4. When done, put into cold water and slip off the outside skin
5. Cut into thin slices
6. While hot, serve with butter, salt, pepper and very sharp vinegar

title: Boiled Cabbage
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- salt
- water
- bacon (optional)

## Directions

1. Clean the cabbage thoroughly
2. Add considerable salt to the water when boiling
3. Boil for about an hour for large drum head cabbage or about thirty minutes for green savory cabbage
4. Do not let cabbage boil too long or it will become watery
5. When done, drain and serve
6. Boil with bacon if liked

title: Boiled Corn Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup sweet milk
- 2 cups corn meal
- 1/3 cup molasses
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1/2 cup flour
- 1 cup sour milk

## Directions

1. Mix sweet milk, molasses, flour, corn meal and soda, dissolved in sour milk.
2. Pour into a greased mould (a small lard pail answers the purpose), cover and boil for two hours.

title: Boiled Fig Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound figs
- 1 pound bread crumbs
- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 pound beef suet
- 4 eggs
- 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Have figs and suet chopped fine and bread crumbs grated, add eggs, sugar, the juice and rind of lemon
2. mix well, adding eggs last
3. Place in a well buttered and sugared bowl and tie in a pudding bag
4. Boil four hours
5. Do not permit water to get into bowl

title: Boiled Fish
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- vinegar
- salt
- parsley
- sliced beets
- lemon
- sliced boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Put fish into cold water and set on the fire to cook gently, or the outside will break before the inner part is done
2. When boiling fish add a little vinegar and salt to the water, to season and prevent the nutriment from being drawn out
3. Garnish with parsley, sliced beets, lemon, or sliced boiled eggs

title: Boiled Frosting
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint granulated sugar
- 3 tablespoons water
- 2 eggs (whites only)

## Directions

1. Boil sugar and water until it spins threadlike when slowly dropped from tip of spoon.
2. Have the whites of eggs beaten stiff and pour hot syrup over, beating hard all the time.
3. Flavor with any preferred extract.

title: Boiled Green Corn
body:
## Ingredients

- corn
- water
- sugar (optional)
- salt

## Directions

1. Prepare the corn and put into boiling water
2. If not entirely fresh, add a tablespoon sugar to the water, but no salt
3. Boil fast about twenty minutes and serve

title: Boiled Okra
body:
## Ingredients

- young tender okra pods
- salt
- butter
- pepper
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Put young tender pods in salted boiling water in granite, porcelain or tin-lined pan (iron will discolor it).
2. Boil fifteen minutes.
3. Remove stems and serve with butter, pepper, salt and vinegar if preferred.

title: Boiled Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- salt
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel off the outside; cut off the ends.
2. Put into cold water and let them scald two minutes.
3. Pour off water; add cold water with a little salt.
4. Boil slowly until tender, thirty or forty minutes.
5. When done drain quite dry.
6. Pour a little melted butter over them and season to taste.

title: Boiled Squash
body:
## Ingredients

- squash
- water
- salt
- pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Pare squash; take out the seeds; cut it in pieces and stew slowly from twenty to forty minutes until quite soft, in a very little water.
2. Drain, squeeze and press well.
3. Season, when mashed, with salt, pepper and a very little butter.

title: Boiled Squash
body:
## Ingredients

- squash
- salt
- pepper
- butter

## Directions

1. Pare squash; take out the seeds; cut it in pieces and stew slowly from twenty to forty minutes until quite soft, in a very little water.
2. Drain, squeeze and press well.
3. Season, when mashed, with salt, pepper and a very little butter.

title: Boiled Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- small solid tomatoes
- butter and salt to taste

## Directions

1. Select small solid tomatoes; throw into a pan of boiling water; boil five minutes and serve.
2. To eat, open, add butter and salt and dip out with a spoon.

title: Bolivia Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups potatoes
- 4 eggs
- 2 tablespoons red peppers
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- salad dressing

## Directions

1. Boil potatoes; when cold cut in cubes.
2. Add hard boil eggs chopped fine, chopped peppers and salt, and mix all together.
3. Serve with any dressing.

title: Boston Brown Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cups graham flour
- ¾ cups corn meal
- ¾ cup molasses
- 1 pint sweet milk
- 1½ teaspoons soda
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Stir all together and steam in fireless three hours and a half, or bake in oven forty minutes.

title: Bouillon
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound of beef
- 1 carrot
- 1 turnip
- celery
- cabbage leaf
- parsley
- 3 quarts cold water
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Cut vegetables in small pieces and let lie in cold water
2. Cut meat in cubes with no fat, wash and put on stove
3. Add to three quarts of cold water with vegetables
4. Season to taste
5. Cook ten hours
6. Strain

title: Braised Chops
body:
## Ingredients

- chops of pork, mutton or veal
- 3 tablespoons melted butter
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 4 cups water
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Take any kind of chop; put butter in skillet, when hot lay in chops
2. When well browned place in stew kettle
3. prepare it with a sauce made from three tablespoons melted butter, flour, salt and pepper to taste, and warm water
4. cook this to a boiling point, stirring all the time
5. Turn over chops and cook slowly till tender

title: Bran Biscuit
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart wheat bran
- 2 teaspoons soda
- 1 pint flour
- 1 tablespoon lard
- 3 cups sour milk
- 6 tablespoons molasses
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Mix dry ingredients; add molasses mixed with soda dissolved in little water, lard and milk.
2. Stir well and bake in gem tins.

title: Bran Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ cups graham flour
- 1 cup wheat bran
- 1 cup corn meal
- ¾ cup molasses
- 1 pint sweet milk
- 1½ teaspoons soda
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Stir all together and steam in fireless three hours and a half, or bake in oven forty minutes.

title: Bread Pancakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 slices bread
- ½ pint of milk
- 1 egg
- salt and pepper
- prepared flour
- sugar

## Directions

1. Break stale bread into small pieces
2. Pour over a little boiling water
3. When soft beat in egg
4. Add milk, a pinch of salt and a little sugar
5. Add prepared flour enough to make a batter

title: Bread Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint bread crumbs
- 1 quart milk
- butter size of egg
- whites 2 eggs
- yolks 2 eggs
- 2 lemons
- 3/4 cup cocoanut
- salt and nutmeg
- tart jelly

## Directions

1. Soak bread crumbs until soft, add other ingredients and bake one hour
2. Serve with tart jelly on top
3. The grated rind of lemons and cocoanut added to the above is very delicious
4. Frost top with meringue of whites of eggs, sprinkle with cocoanut and brown

title: Breakfast Sausage
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound lean veal
- ¼ pound Swift premium bacon
- ¼ teaspoon pepper
- ½ teaspoon powdered sage
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- cream
- bacon grease
- salt

## Directions

1. Grind veal and bacon in a beef chopper.
2. Add salt, pepper and sage.
3. Form into balls and fry in bacon grease.
4. Serve with cream sauce made by adding butter, flour and cream to the bacon grease. Delicious when used with flannel cakes for breakfast.

title: Brown Stone Front
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg yolk
- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 4 squares chocolate (unsweetened)
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1/2 cup milk
- 2 cups flour
- 1 teaspoon soda

## Directions

1. Grate chocolate, mix with milk and yolk of one egg and sugar, boil until thick
2. When cool add vanilla
3. Cream butter and sugar, add the egg yolks well beaten, and milk
4. Then add flour and soda
5. Mix in Part I, and, lastly, fold in well beaten white
6. Bake in layers and put together with boiled icing

title: Browned Potatoes with Roast
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- 1 onion
- salt and pepper
- flour

## Directions

1. Peel, cook and mash the required amount.
2. Add while hot, salt, pepper and a very little chopped onion.
3. Form into small balls.
4. Dredge with flour.
5. Place around roast and bake about twenty minutes before serving.

title: Burnt Leather Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cup sugar
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup water
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Burn syrup: One-half cup sugar stirred in a pan until it burns
2. Add one half cup boiling water and boil until thick syrup
3. Cream butter and sugar
4. Add the yolks of eggs well beaten, water and two cups of flour, sifted three times
5. Beat for five minutes
6. Then add three teaspoons of burnt syrup, baking powder stirred into one half cup of flour, whites of eggs well beaten

title: Butter Scotch
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup molasses

## Directions

1. Boil all together until it hardens when dropped into cold water.
2. Spread thinly on buttered pans and mark in little squares.

title: Cabbage Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cabbage
- 1 pint milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Boil the cabbage until tender and chop fine
2. Place in a baking pan with milk, eggs and butter, and pepper and salt to taste
3. Mix well
4. Bake one-half hour

title: Cabbage Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 head cabbage
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- 3/4 cup vinegar
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 tomatoes
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Take a firm head of cabbage, cut fine, add hard-boiled eggs, chopped fine, vinegar, sugar, mustard, and salt and pepper to taste.
2. Mix well.
3. Garnish with sliced tomatoes.

title: Cabbage with Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cabbage
- 3 tomatoes
- 2 small onions
- bit of garlic
- salt

## Directions

1. Let a cabbage boil until tender, then cut into small pieces
2. Fry together until cooked, two or three sliced tomatoes, two small onions sliced and a bit of garlic
3. Add salt
4. When cooked tender, spread over the cabbage and serve

title: Cake Custard
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups custard
- 6 sponge cakes
- whipped cream
- 2 tablespoons peach jelly or marmalade

## Directions

1. Make a sweet boiled custard, about three cupfuls
2. While this is hot stir into it sponge cakes broken up very small, and jelly or marmalade
3. Beat hard and when cool set on the ice to get very cold
4. When ready to serve, heap on top of each dish a tablespoon of whipped cream
5. In the center of the cream put a very little of the peach jelly

title: Candied Grape Fruit Peel
body:
## Ingredients

- grape fruit peel
- lemon or orange juice
- sugar

## Directions

1. After dividing the fruit into two parts, scrape pulp from skins, and cut each piece of peel into six pieces.
2. Cover with cold water and let come to a boil.
3. Pour water off.
4. Cover with cold water again and let come to a boil and boil twenty minutes; pour off water.
5. Cover again with cold water and let boil twenty minutes; repeat this once more; each time press the water out after boiling.
6. Then cook measure for measure of peel and sugar with enough water to make a syrup.
7. Boil until all the water is taken up in peel.
8. Add lemon or orange juice before taking out of kettle; then place on buttered platter or waxed paper, expose to air several hours.
9. Then cut in slices.

title: Caramel Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 4 eggs
- 1 can cream
- 1½ cups nuts
- Vanilla to taste
- 1 teaspoon cornstarch
- 2¼ cups water

## Directions

1. Boil one cup of sugar with one fourth cup water until a thick syrup
2. Brown, but be careful not to burn
3. To one half can of cream add two parts of water
4. Place on the fire and when it boils, add heaping teaspoon of cornstarch
5. When done, add the yolks of four eggs, well beaten, with one cup of sugar
6. Remove from the fire and add the boiling hot syrup; stirring until all has been dissolved
7. Flavor with vanilla, and add nuts, finely chopped
8. When half frozen, add half a can of cream and the whites of the eggs well beaten

title: Caramel Custard
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 8 tablespoons sugar
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat eggs thoroughly
2. Add four tablespoons of sugar, milk, and vanilla
3. Make custard
4. Make a caramel of four tablespoons sugar browned
5. Have ready little tin moulds and put in each one teaspoon of hot caramel
6. Turn quickly in your fingers so as to coat the sides of the mould with caramel as evenly as possible
7. Fill the moulds about three-fourths full of the custard
8. Place them in a pan of hot water
9. Bake in the oven until the custard is set
10. Turn out of the moulds while warm and serve cold

title: Caramel Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 3/4 cup cream
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Boil until it starts to string from spoon.

title: Caramel Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- butter size of egg
- 1 cup boiling water
- 1 tablespoon flour
- pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Brown sugar being careful not to burn, add boiling water, butter, salt and flour
2. Cook carefully, be sure the flour is smooth

title: Catawba Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- ½ package gelatine
- ½ cup boiled rice
- 1 pint whipped cream
- ¾ cup chopped figs
- 1 cup pulverized sugar
- ¾ cup chopped dates
- 1 cup grape juice
- ¾ cup cold water

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in half a cup of cold water and melt over hot water
2. Mix with other ingredients
3. Freeze

title: Catsup
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 ripe tomatoes
- 4 green peppers
- 2 onions
- 4 cups vinegar
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 2 tablespoons salt
- 1 tablespoon grated nutmeg
- 2 tablespoons ginger
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon mustard

## Directions

1. Follow same directions as for making chili sauce

title: Cayenne Cheese Straws
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup of flour
- 2 ounces butter
- 2 ounces grated cheese
- 1 egg yolk
- pinch of salt
- few grains of cayenne

## Directions

1. Mix all into paste.
2. Roll out to the thickness of silver quarters, four or five inches long; cut into strips an inch wide; twist as you would a paper squill and lay on baking sheet, slightly floured.
3. Bake in moderate oven until crisp, but not the least brown.
4. Serve cold.

title: Charlotte Russe
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 ounce gelatine
- 1/2 cup cold water
- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup lemon juice
- 2 cups orange juice
- 4 eggs
- lady fingers

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in cold water half an hour
2. Make syrup of sugar, lemon and orange juice
3. Turn slowly into the beaten egg yolks
4. Beat all the time
5. Put into double boiler and cook until thick
6. Add dissolved gelatine
7. Strain and beat until cold
8. Add whites of eggs beaten to a stiff froth
9. Line a mould with lady fingers
10. Pour in the mixture
11. Put on the ice to harden

title: Cheese Crackers
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 crackers
- 6 teaspoons grated cheese
- pinch cayenne

## Directions

1. Cover crackers with cheese seasoned with cayenne pepper.
2. Heat in oven until cheese melts.

title: Cheese Cups
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cheese
- 1 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. In a saucepan melt cheese, add milk slowly.
2. When mixture begins to thicken, add eggs slightly beaten, stir until the consistency of scrambled eggs; add seasoning.
3. Take rolls cut in half, scoop out soft portion and butter surface, crisping them in oven.
4. Fill with mixture.

title: Cheese Custards
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 3/4 cup milk
- 3 tablespoons grated cheese
- salt, pepper and paprika to taste

## Directions

1. Beat up eggs, add boiling milk and grated cheese, seasoning of salt, pepper and paprika; pour into small buttered moulds, stirring all the time so as not to let cheese settle.
2. Cover with buttered paper and steam gently until set.
3. Cut thin slices of bread and stamp out rounds a little larger than the moulds, fry in hot melted butter to a golden brown.
4. Turn out the custard on the bread; put a little pile of grated cheese on top of each and brown in oven.
5. Serve garnished with cress.

title: Cheese Fondu
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup fine bread crumbs
- 2 cups grated cheese
- 1 saltspoon dry mustard
- 2 eggs
- pinch of cayenne

## Directions

1. Melt butter and whisk it into the boiled milk; add the dissolved bread crumbs; let cool.
2. Beat the yolks of eggs; put in seasoning, add cheese, mix all together.
3. Add whipped whites of eggs; pour into deep tin lined with buttered paper.
4. Allow for rising.
5. Bake about twenty minutes and serve immediately on taking from oven.

title: Cheese for the Chafing Dish
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups Eastern or California cheese
- 3 cups bread crumbs
- 3 cups milk
- 3 eggs
- 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce
- salt to taste
- paprika

## Directions

1. Soak bread in milk one hour before using
2. Cut cheese in small pieces
3. Let the cheese melt, cover with paprika
4. add bread and milk, then the eggs well beaten
5. Serve on crackers or toast

title: Cheese Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon grated cheese
- 1/2 teaspoon meat extract
- 1 tablespoon hot water
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt, pepper and grated nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat up the whites of eggs; add the yolks, salt, pepper, grated nutmeg, cheese and meat extract dissolved in the hot water; stir lightly.
2. Melt the butter in omelet pan; pour in the mixture and fry very carefully till light brown; then put in oven to brown top.
3. Fold over and serve on hot dish.

title: Cheese Patties
body:
## Ingredients

- pie crust
- grated cheese
- currant jelly

## Directions

1. Make patties of rich pie crust and bake.
2. Fill with layer of jelly, a layer of grated cheese, another layer of jelly and last the cheese.
3. Put in oven to brown.
4. Good served with meat or fowl.

title: Cheese Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 lb. grated cheese
- 1 cup milk
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon flour
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 1 tablespoon bread or cracker crumbs
- salt, pepper and paprika to taste

## Directions

1. Mix together grated cheese, flour, bread crumbs, salt, pepper and paprika to taste; then add the milk, boiling hot, butter, the yolks of eggs and the whites stiffly beaten.
2. Mix gently; pour into buttered pudding dish and bake twenty minutes, in moderate oven.
3. Serve hot.

title: Cheese Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- cheese
- sliced lemon
- lettuce
- mayonnaise dressing

## Directions

1. Arrange crisp, tender lettuce for individual serving.
2. Sprinkle freely with grated cheese.
3. Dress with mayonnaise and garnish with sliced lemons.

title: Cheese Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 hard boiled egg
- ¾ pound grated cheese
- ⅛ teaspoon salt
- ⅛ teaspoon pepper
- ⅛ teaspoon mustard
- 1 teaspoon melted butter
- 1 tablespoon vinegar or cold water

## Directions

1. Crumble the yolk of the egg
2. Put in the butter and work smooth
3. Add other ingredients, mixing all well
4. Spread between biscuits or oat cakes
5. If too highly seasoned, season to taste

title: Cheese Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 ounce butter
- 1 ounce flour
- 3/4 pint milk
- 3 ounces finely grated cheese
- 3 eggs
- pinch of salt and cayenne pepper

## Directions

1. Melt butter, mix smoothly with it the flour and seasoning, add to the milk and simmer over fire, stirring continually till as thick as melted butter; add cheese, turn into bowl and add the well beaten yolks of two eggs.
2. Whisk three whites of eggs to stiff froth and just before souffle is baked put in these whites and pour into round tin.
3. Souffle will rise very high.
4. Bake twenty minutes and serve immediately.
5. Sufficient for six people.

title: Cheese Straws
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grated cheese
- 1 cup flour
- 3/4 cup butter

## Directions

1. Mix cheese, butter and flour together, moisten with a little cold water.
2. Roll thin, cut into strips and bake in medium oven.

title: Cherry Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- maraschino cherries
- English walnuts
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 teaspoon dry mustard
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 pint cream
- salt
- red pepper
- black pepper

## Directions

1. Fill maraschino cherries with English walnuts, sprinkle nuts around cherries.
2. Beat yolks of eggs, butter, mustard, salt, red and black pepper together.
3. Add vinegar and cook until thick.
4. When cold add the cream, beating it in well.
5. Pour dressing over cherries and serve on lettuce leaves.

title: Cherry Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can cherries
- hazelnuts
- lettuce
- dressing

## Directions

1. Take large cherries, stone and put hazelnuts in place of stones.
2. Serve on lettuce with any kind of dressing.

title: Cherry Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can cherries
- hazelnuts
- lettuce
- salad dressing

## Directions

1. Take large cherries, stone and put hazelnuts in place of stones.
2. Serve on lettuce with any kind of dressing.

title: Chestnut Stuffing
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 quarts large roasted chestnuts
- 1 ounce butter
- salt and pepper
- 1 teaspoon olive oil

## Directions

1. Mash chestnuts, add melted butter, pepper and salt, and, if desired, one teaspoon olive oil

title: Chicken Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large chicken
- 5/8 cups flour
- 1½ cups broth
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Melt butter
2. When hot add flour and broth and cook until very thick
3. Stir in minced chicken and make into shape
4. Dip into beaten egg and then into cracker crumbs and fry in deep fat
5. If no broth on hand, use milk

title: Chicken Curry
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup rice
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Prepare chicken for frying, brown in butter.
2. Cover with boiling water and simmer till tender.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Add to the curry made from Indian Curry recipe.
5. Serve with boiled rice.

title: Chicken Entree
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 chickens
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 18 sticks macaroni
- 2 cans mushrooms
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Remove meat from bones
2. Chop fine
3. Boil the bones in water enough to cover them, for half an hour
4. Add to the chopped chicken the eggs well beaten and sufficient of the stock to make a smooth paste
5. Season with salt and pepper, add butter
6. Boil macaroni until tender, being careful not to break
7. Line a buttered porcelain bowl with the macaroni and fill with mixture
8. Set in saucepan of boiling water and cook for half hour, or until chicken is tender
9. Reverse in circular chop dish, surrounded with mushrooms and serve hot

title: Chicken in Rice Casserole
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup rice
- 2½ cups milk
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 teaspoon salt
- ¾ teaspoon pepper
- 1 pint cold chicken
- 1 cup peas
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Wash rice; put in boiling water and cook twenty minutes, then drain
2. Add one half cup milk, one tablespoon butter, salt and pepper
3. Stir into rather smooth paste
4. Brush custard cups with butter and line to the depth of one inch with rice mixture
5. Put two tablespoons butter and two of flour together
6. add one pint milk, stir until boiling, add salt and pepper and chicken nicely seasoned and blocked
7. Fill this mixture in center of cups, cover with rice, stand in pan of boiling water and cook in oven twenty minutes
8. Turn carefully on to heated dish, garnish with nicely seasoned peas and serve

title: Chicken Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large chicken
- 1/2 pint pickles
- 6 eggs
- 1 tablespoon mustard
- 1 pint green celery or white cabbage
- 1 teaspoon pepper

## Directions

1. Boil chicken in salt water; when cold, skin, take from bones and chop fine.
2. Hard-boil eggs, cut celery in small pieces (tender white cabbage, shredded, will answer if no celery) chop pickles, add mustard and pepper.
3. Mix thoroughly.

title: Chicken Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- stock from 1 chicken
- 2 tablespoons rice
- 2 tablespoons parsley
- 2 tablespoons celery

## Directions

1. Skim off grease from stock
2. Take 1 quart of stock
3. Put in rice, parsley, celery
4. Cook one hour
5. Season

title: Chili Sauce I
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 quarts ripe tomatoes
- ⅔ cup salt
- ¾ cup celery
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 quart vinegar
- 1⅜ tablespoons allspice
- 1 teaspoon mace
- 1 tablespoon pepper
- 4 red peppers
- 3 large onions

## Directions

1. Peel and cut up tomatoes
2. Chop the celery, red peppers and onions fine
3. Mix all the ingredients together in the fireless cooker kettle and allow it to boil twenty minutes and place in the cooker from eight to twenty four hours
4. Remove from the cooker, bring again to a brisk boil and seal in glass bottles or earthenware jars with wax or paraffin

title: Chili Sauce II
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cans tomatoes
- 4 large onions
- 6 green peppers
- 6 tablespoons sugar
- 2 cups vinegar
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- ⅜ teaspoon salt
- ¾ cup mustard seeds

## Directions

1. Cook slowly two and one half hours

title: Chili Sauce III
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 dozen ripe tomatoes
- 1 onion
- 3 small green peppers
- ¾ cup sugar
- ⅜ teaspoon cayenne pepper
- 2 cups vinegar
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Boil all together until thick
2. Then add vinegar
3. Strain and set on the stove
4. Add salt and spices
5. Boil all together five minutes and remove

title: Chocolate Caramels
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grated chocolate
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1 tablespoon glycerine

## Directions

1. Put all but the chocolate in a kettle and boil fast.
2. When it will almost thread, add chocolate.
3. Pour in buttered tins.
4. Cut when cold.

title: Chocolate Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup light brown sugar
- 1/2 cup shortening
- 1 egg
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1 heaping teaspoon baking powder
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 2 squares chocolate
- 1/2 cup walnuts
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Beat the egg
2. Add the sugar and melted or soft shortening
3. Cream thoroughly
4. Add the milk
5. Sift flour and baking powder, add slowly
6. Stir in the melted chocolate, walnuts and vanilla
7. Drop for small cookies

title: Chocolate Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2/5 cake chocolate
- pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Boil together until it thickens, stirring constantly.

title: Chocolate Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 tablespoons cocoa
- 1 tablespoon hot water
- Plain ice cream

## Directions

1. Place cocoa in pan to heat (without burning) with one tablespoon of hot water
2. When the consistency of paste, add to plain ice cream and freeze

title: Chocolate Macaroons
body:
## Ingredients

- butter size of an egg
- 2 ounces Baker's chocolate
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 cup flour

## Directions

1. Melt butter, stir in grated chocolate until smooth
2. Add sugar, eggs not beaten, vanilla, flour, baking powder
3. Flour board and fingers
4. Form dough into little balls
5. Bake in greased pans, leaving room to spread
6. Bake slowly

title: Chocolate Pie No. 1
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint milk
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 heaping teaspoon cornstarch
- 1/2 cup chocolate, melted

## Directions

1. Mix sugar, cornstarch, egg yolks and chocolate and stir into boiling milk.
2. Beat white for meringue.
3. Bake in half set pie crust.

title: Chocolate Pie No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- chocolate
- sugar
- custard pie

## Directions

1. Put some grated chocolate into basin and place on back of stove, let it melt but do not add any water.
2. Beat egg with some sugar in it; when melted spread this over custard pie.

title: Chocolate Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- water
- 3/4 cake chocolate
- chopped nuts

## Directions

1. Mix sugar and chocolate with enough water to make a thick syrup
2. Chopped nuts may be added when cold

title: Chocolate Sauce for Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- Chopped nuts
- ⅛ cake chocolate
- Water

## Directions

1. Boil together sugar and chocolate with enough water to make a thick syrup
2. When cold, chopped nuts may be added
3. Pour over ice cream when serving

title: Chutney
body:
## Ingredients

- juice of 3 lemons
- 8 pounds tomatoes
- 1 pound raisins
- 4 pounds onions
- 2 1/2 pounds brown sugar
- 1 pound figs
- 1/2 pound prunes
- 1 pound red peppers
- 1/2 pound salt
- 6 pounds apples
- 2 ounces ground ginger
- 5 quarts vinegar

## Directions

1. Pound these ingredients with pestle and mortar.
2. Boil in vinegar till it is the consistency of chutney.
3. Pass with curried dishes.

title: Cinnamon Rolls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 liter bread sponge
- 1 egg
- 2 teaspoons sugar
- 3 tablespoons butter
- flour
- powdered cinnamon

## Directions

1. To bread sponge add well beaten egg, sugar and butter.
2. Stir into the sponge enough sifted flour to knead.
3. Knead the dough for about ten minutes, put it into a mixing bowl, and set it in a warm place to rise.
4. When it has doubled in size, pour it out on a well-floured board, roll it to a thickness of about one centimeter, spread it with butter, sprinkle it with sugar and dust with powdered cinnamon.
5. Roll up the dough like a jelly roll, cut it into pieces about five centimeters thick and put the slices, cut-side down, into a greased pan.
6. Let them rise to double in size, and bake them in a quick oven.

title: Cocoanut Candy
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cocoanut
- 2 pounds sugar

## Directions

1. Put the milk of the cocoanut and sugar on fine.
2. When it begins to boil add the grated meat of cocoanut and cook until meat is tender.
3. Pour into buttered pans to cool and cut in squares before it hardens.

title: Cocoanut Custard
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 2 cocoanuts
- one pint of cocoanut milk

## Directions

1. Mix eggs, sugar and flour.
2. To this add one pint of cocoanut milk, obtained by grating, washing and squeezing well the meat of cocoanuts.
3. Bake either in crust or in pudding dish without crust.

title: Cocoanut Drop Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 3/4 cups flour
- 1 rounded teaspoon baking powder
- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup sweet cream
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup grated cocoanut (dry)
- grated lemon rind

## Directions

1. Sift together flour and baking powder
2. Beat egg and sugar until light
3. Add grated cocoanut and a little lemon rind
4. Add alternately flour and cream
5. Drop in little pats on buttered pans, dusted with flour, allowing room to spread
6. Sprinkle a little grated cocoanut over each cake
7. Bake in a moderate oven

title: Cocoanut Macaroons
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 3 cups shredded cocoanut (dry)
- 2 teaspoons vanilla

## Directions

1. To the unbeaten whites of the three eggs add sugar and beat until thick and light
2. Add cocoanut and vanilla
3. Drop from end of oven until firm

title: Cocoanut Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint milk
- 1 grated cocoanut
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix cocoanut with well beaten yolks and cup of sugar.
2. Stir in the milk, filling the pan even full and bake.
3. Put over top meringue made of whites of eggs and three tablespoons sugar.
4. Brown quickly.

title: Cocoanut Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cocoanut
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1/2 cup cocoanut milk
- 3/4 cup sugar
- yolks 3 eggs
- whites 2 eggs
- 2 cups sugar

## Directions

1. Fresh cocoanut, grated, cocoanut milk mixed with it to make juice.
2. Add beaten egg yolks, sugar and vanilla.
3. Mix and bake ten or fifteen minutes.
4. Boil sugar and a little water until it threads, add to the beaten whites of eggs and spread over pudding.
5. Put in oven and brown.
6. Make in morning for evening dinner.

title: Cocoanut Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons minute tapioca
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1 cup grated cocoanut
- 1 quart milk
- 4 tablespoons powdered sugar
- 4 eggs
- maraschino cherries

## Directions

1. Put tapioca in the milk and cook in a double boiler at least ten minutes.
2. Beat the yolks of eggs and sugar together; add them to the milk and half of the cocoanut.
3. Cook five minutes longer; take from the fire, and when cold turn into a shallow glass dish.
4. Beat the whites of eggs until light; add powdered sugar and beat again; spread this over the top and sprinkle over the remaining cocoanut.
5. Place a few maraschino cherries over the top.

title: Cocoanut Pull Candy
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cocoanut
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 cups hot water
- 1 lime

## Directions

1. Grate cocoanut and pour over it the hot water.
2. Stir until it becomes quite creamy.
3. Strain through a piece of gauze, squeezing to get all the cream.
4. Take the cocoanut milk and sugar, put on to boil.
5. Peel the lime without breaking pulp and drop into candy.
6. Boil without stirring until it thickens in water.
7. Take out lime and pour on buttered plates.
8. As soon as cool enough pull until creamy.

title: Cocoanut Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cocoanuts
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 2 cups hot water
- 1/2 cup cream

## Directions

1. Grate two cocoanuts, pour over it two cups hot water and let stand one hour
2. Strain through a cloth
3. To this cocoanut milk add sugar and boil to a thick syrup
4. Add cream, beat well and remove from the stove without boiling

title: Cocoanut Syrup
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cocoanuts
- 1 pint water
- 4 pounds brown sugar

## Directions

1. Grate cocoanuts and to the grated meat add water
2. Wash thoroughly and squeeze out
3. To the liquid obtained add brown sugar and boil to the consistency of honey, skimming frequently

title: Cocoanut-Meat Dulce
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cocoanuts
- 4 pounds brown sugar

## Directions

1. To the grated meat of cocoanuts add dark sugar and when dissolved cook until it is a thick preserve.

title: Coconut Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 3 cups sugar
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1 cup grated coconut
- 1/2 cup boiling water
- 2 cups flour
- 1 orange

## Directions

1. Beat together until thick and light colored, the yolks of five eggs, whites of three, and two cups of sugar
2. Add the grated rind and juice of orange
3. Then, in succession, boiling water and stiffly beaten whites of three eggs, flour mixed with baking powder, and coconut
4. Make a boiled icing of two whites of eggs, a heaping cup sugar, half cup water and juice of one orange
5. Bake in sheet about an inch thick, in moderate oven
6. When cool, spread with jelly and cover with icing

title: Codfish Balls and Codfish Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/8 pound salt cod
- 1 pint mashed potatoes
- 1 rounding tablespoon butter
- 1 saltspoon pepper
- 2 egg yolks
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Pick apart salt cod, cover with cold water, bring to boiling point and drain
2. Cover with boiling water again and let stand five minutes; drain and press
3. Add hot mashed potatoes, butter, pepper and the yolk of eggs
4. Mix thoroughly and form balls
5. Dip in beaten egg, roll in bread crumbs and fry in deep, hot fat
6. Serve plain with tomato sauce
7. For souffle: add the well beaten whites of the eggs and bake the mixture a golden brown

title: Coffee Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- butter, melted, size of an egg
- 2 cups flour (before sifting)
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup milk

## Directions

1. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon and bake twenty minutes

title: Coffee Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup brown sugar
- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup molasses
- 4 cups flour
- 1 cup strong cold coffee
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 2 pounds raisins
- 1/2 pound citron
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 cup walnuts
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add coffee and molasses, then eggs well beaten
3. Next fruit, spices and nuts, and flour
4. Bake in one pan

title: Cold Slaw Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 1 teaspoon mustard
- 1 cup vinegar
- pepper

## Directions

1. Beat up eggs with sugar, add butter, mustard, pepper, and lastly vinegar.
2. Cook like a soft custard.
3. Some like to add a cup of cream; in that case use less vinegar and add cream when dressing is cold.

title: Common Batter
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup flour
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon melted butter
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix in very smooth batter, a little thicker than batter cakes

title: Cooked Salad Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 teaspoon flour
- 1 tablespoon water
- 3 tablespoons cream
- 1/2 teaspoon mustard
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 2 1/2 tablespoons sugar
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- dash celery salt
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Rub together butter, flour, salt, mustard and sugar; add the egg and mix well.
2. Add vinegar and water, cook over slow fire, stirring all the time until thick.
3. When almost cool add cream.

title: Corn Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup corn meal
- 2 cups flour
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 9 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup milk
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix and sift dry ingredients.
2. Add milk, eggs well beaten, and butter.
3. Bake in shallow buttered pan in hot oven twenty minutes.

title: Corn Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cornmeal
- 2 cups flour
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 9 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup milk
- 2 tablespoons melted butter
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix and sift dry ingredients.
2. Add milk, eggs well beaten, and butter.
3. Bake in shallow buttered pan in hot oven twenty minutes.

title: Corn Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup corn
- 1 cup milk
- 1/2 cup flour
- 1 egg
- pinch of salt
- 1 teaspoon butter
- powdered sugar (optional)

## Directions

1. Mix well corn, milk, flour, egg, salt and butter into thick batter
2. Fry in small cakes in very hot butter or substitute
3. Serve with plenty of butter and powdered sugar, if so desired

title: Corn Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup corn meal
- 1 cup sweet milk
- 1 cup flour
- 1/2 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 1/3 cup sugar
- 3 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix together cornmeal, milk, flour, butter, eggs and sugar, and add baking powder just before baking.

title: Corn Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint corn
- 2 eggs
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Mix well together corn, well beaten eggs, milk and butter, salt and pepper to taste
2. Bake one-half hour

title: Corn Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint or 1 can corn
- 1 pint water
- 1 quart milk
- 1 teaspoon flour
- 2 teaspoons butter
- 1 slice onion
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Cook the corn in the water thirty minutes.
2. Scald the milk with the onion, and when it boils add the butter and flour, creamed.
3. Cook for a few minutes.
4. Add the corn.
5. Cook a little longer.
6. Strain and serve.

title: Corn Starch Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- whites 4 eggs
- 3 tablespoons corn starch
- vanilla flavor
- 1/4 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup grated cocoanut

## Directions

1. Dissolve corn starch into a little of the milk.
2. Stir sugar into the remainder and bring to a boil, add starch; stir constantly a few minutes then add the stiffly beaten whites of eggs; and cook a little longer.
3. Flavor with vanilla and mould, or add 1/4 of a cocoanut, grated, before putting into a mould, serve with cream or a yellow sauce.

title: Cottage Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 egg
- 1 cup milk
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- lemon or nutmeg

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients
2. bake in small dripping pan and serve hot with creamy sauce
3. Fruit added to the above is very nice

title: Crab Apple Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- Chinese crab apples
- 1 cup sugar to 1 cup juice

## Directions

1. Wash well Chinese crab apples, cover with water and cook until soft.
2. Strain through a thin cloth.
3. To one part of juice take one part of sugar.
4. Boil until it jells.

title: Crab Apple Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart Chinese crab apples
- 3 pints sugar
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cloves

## Directions

1. Carefully look over a quart, or more, of Chinese crab apples to be sure there are no wormy ones
2. Removing the blossom will generally disclose any flaw in the apple
3. Leave the stems on
4. Put in cold water, and bring to a boil, cooking until the fruit is tender, being careful it does not cook to pieces
5. Prepare and have ready a syrup
6. In making sweet pickles tie spices up in small bags, leaving them in the syrup
7. Place the fruit, a little at a time, in the syrup, and let boil slowly a few minutes, then put into a jar or large necked bottle
8. Pour the syrup over the fruit and have sufficient to cover
9. Let stand a few days before using
10. If fermentation begins, reboil the syrup, or if this does not stop fermentation heat all the pickles to a boiling point

title: Crab with Red Peppers
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 2 tablespoons bread crumbs
- 1 1/2 tablespoons pimientos
- 4 tablespoons butter or lard
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup crab meat
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice
- a bit of nutmeg

## Directions

1. Boil the crabs and take the meat from the shells.
2. Boil 4 eggs hard.
3. Chop the whites and mash the yolks.
4. Mix with fine soft white bread crumbs and chopped red peppers (the canned pimientos).
5. Melt but do not brown butter or lard; stir in the eggs, add slowly milk, and lastly crab meat.
6. When hot, put in salt, nutmeg, and lemon juice.
7. Serve at once on toast or with rice.

title: Cream Dates
body:
## Ingredients

- dates
- fondant

## Directions

1. Remove the pits from dates and fill cavities with fondant.

title: Cream Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup hot water
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 1 egg white
- 1/2 cup chopped walnuts
- 1 tablespoon grated coconut
- 3/4 cup raisins

## Directions

1. Put water on sugar, let them simmer.
2. Beat white of egg and mix with syrup.
3. When cold add nuts, raisins and coconut.
4. Place between layers.

title: Cream of Asparagus Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can asparagus
- 2 cups boiling water
- 1 tablespoon flour or corn starch
- 1 cup evaporated cream
- butter, size of walnut
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Cut off the tender ends of the canned asparagus
2. Press the pulp from the fibrous stems by rubbing through a sieve
3. Add this pulp to the juice from the can
4. Have ready the boiling water in which the corn starch or flour has been thoroughly cooked
5. Add the cream, the juice, and the pulp
6. Let it just reach the boiling point
7. Add the tender tips, salt, pepper, and butter
8. Serve

title: Cream of Celery Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint of cooked celery
- 1 quart of milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- 3/4 teaspoon celery salt
- 3/4 saltspoon white pepper

## Directions

1. Add stewed and sifted celery to the foundation
2. Combine milk, butter and flour creamed
3. Add onion juice, celery salt, white pepper and a dash of cayenne or little slices of sweet pepper

title: Cream Walnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- English walnuts
- uncooked fondant

## Directions

1. Crack English walnuts carefully so as to preserve the halves in perfect shape.
2. With fingers slightly moistened with water or butter, form uncooked fondant into small balls and press two pieces of the nut together on either side of the balls, flattening them to the desired shape.
3. Lay on waxed or buttered paper.

title: Creamed Codfish
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound salt codfish
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 3/8 pint of milk
- dash of pepper
- 1 egg yolk
- 3/8 teaspoon salt
- plain boiled potatoes

## Directions

1. Pick apart codfish
2. Wash thoroughly in two waters
3. Soak over night in cold water
4. Next morning, drain, cover with boiling water and cook below the boiling point for five minutes
5. Drain and press
6. Rub butter and flour together
7. Add milk
8. Stir until boiling
9. Add a dash of pepper and the codfish
10. Cover and stand over hot water ten minutes
11. Add the beaten yolk of an egg and salt
12. Serve with plain boiled potatoes

title: Creamed Cucumber
body:
## Ingredients

- large cucumbers
- water
- cream dressing

## Directions

1. Use large cucumbers
2. Remove seeds
3. Cut into small pieces
4. Boil in water until tender
5. Then serve with a cream dressing

title: Creamed Eggs on Toast
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 slices of bread
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 5 hard boiled eggs
- 1 teaspoon corn starch
- 1 1/2 cups milk
- 1 saltspoon salt
- pepper

## Directions

1. Toast the bread and arrange on a platter.
2. Cut around the eggs so as to remove the yolks.
3. Butter the toast, on which lay the whites cut in rings, and upon this grate the yolks.
4. Have ready a cream sauce made with milk, butter, corn starch (dissolved in a little milk) and salt.
5. Bring this to a boil.
6. Pour over the prepared toast and sprinkle with a little pepper.
7. Serve.

title: Creamed Fish
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups cold fish
- 1 cup cream sauce
- salt and pepper to taste
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup milk or cream
- squares of buttered toast
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Shred any left over fish, taking out bones and skin
2. Mix with hot sauce
3. Stir until smooth
4. Serve on squares of buttered toast, or put in a deep dish, cover with bread crumbs, and brown
5. Sauce: Mix butter and flour into smooth paste
6. Add milk or cream
7. Cook until thick and smooth
8. Pour over fish

title: Creamed Fish by Mrs. G. E. Seybolt
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 3/8 pint milk
- 1 level teaspoon salt
- 1 salt spoon pepper
- 1 pint cooked fish

## Directions

1. Rub together butter and flour
2. Add milk
3. Stir until boiling
4. Take from fire
5. Add salt and pepper and cold cooked fish picked into flakes
6. Stand this over hot water until thoroughly heated
7. Serve on toast, in pate shells, potato cases, or in a potato border

title: Creamed Green Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- green onions
- cream dressing
- toast

## Directions

1. Cut tops and all into small pieces.
2. Boil until tender.
3. Make a rather thick cream dressing.
4. Serve on toast.

title: Creamed or Hashed Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- milk
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Chop cold boiled potatoes rather fine; season with salt and pepper.
2. Put them in a baking dish; pour over sufficient good milk to just cover and put in a quick oven until nicely browned.

title: Creamy Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 4 tablespoons fruit juice
- 3/4 cup butter
- 2 teaspoons vanilla
- 3/4 cup cream

## Directions

1. Beat sugar and butter to a cream, add fruit juice, vanilla and cream
2. Place the bowl in hot water and stir until creamy

title: Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart cold chopped meat
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 4 tablespoons flour
- 1 pint hot milk
- 1 egg
- bread crumbs
- 2 teaspoons salt
- ¾ teaspoon white pepper
- dash cayenne
- 1 saltspoon grated nutmeg
- 1 tablespoon onion juice
- 2 tablespoons parsley

## Directions

1. Chop sufficient cold meat to make one quart
2. rub together butter and flour
3. add them to a pint of hot milk
4. stir and cook until a smooth thick paste, then take from fire
5. Add to meat, salt and pepper, nutmeg, parsley and onion juice
6. Mix thoroughly; add cream sauce; mix again and turn out to cool
7. When cold form into croquettes
8. dip in egg, roll in bread crumbs and fry in hot fat

title: Cucumber Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart sliced cucumbers
- 1 onion
- 1 green pepper
- 1 cup brown sugar
- 20 whole cloves
- 1 teaspoonful turmeric powder
- 1 teaspoon mustard seed
- vinegar to cover
- water
- salt

## Directions

1. Slice cucumbers, onion and pepper, cover with water and salt and let stand three hours
2. Drain
3. Add sugar, spices and vinegar to cover
4. Scald fifteen minutes but do not boil

title: Custard Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- pinch salt
- nutmeg or vanilla
- 1 quart milk

## Directions

1. Beat together until very light egg yolks and sugar; flavor with nutmeg or vanilla.
2. Add beaten whites, salt and, lastly, a quart of milk.
3. Mix well and pour into tins lined with paste.
4. Bake until firm.

title: Date Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- dates
- cold water
- butter
- thin sliced bread

## Directions

1. Clean dates and cover with cold water for three minutes
2. Drain and lay on a plate, and put in hot oven for five minutes
3. Remove stones, cut in slices and place between thin buttered slices of bread

title: Date Tapioca
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 tablespoons tapioca
- 4 cups scalded milk
- 12 tablespoons sugar
- 1 cup chopped dates
- pinch salt
- eggs
- lemon sauce or whipped cream

## Directions

1. Soak tapioca in cold water; mix with sugar, salt, add hot milk; cook fifteen minutes, add yolks of eggs; cook three minutes.
2. Beat whites of eggs stiff, heap on top; place in oven to brown.
3. Serve cold with lemon sauce or whipped cream.

title: Deviled Crabs
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 crabs
- bread crumbs
- 3 hard boiled eggs
- juice of 1 lemon
- butter, size of walnut
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Pick the meat from boiled crabs and cut into fine bits.
2. Add one-third as much bread crumbs, chopped eggs, the juice of one small lemon, salt and pepper, and butter the size of a walnut.
3. Clean the shells well and fill with the mixture.
4. Place bits of butter over the top and brown in the oven.

title: Deviled Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 boiled eggs
- 1 teaspoon melted butter
- 1 teaspoon celery seed
- vinegar
- salt and pepper
- mustard to taste

## Directions

1. Boil eggs and cut in halves.
2. Remove yolks and mash them.
3. Add melted butter, celery seed, a little vinegar, salt, pepper and mustard to taste.
4. Mix well and put back in the white cup of the eggs.

title: Deviled Oysters
body:
## Ingredients

- 50 oysters
- 1 pint liquor and milk
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 egg yolks
- 1 tablespoon celery
- salt and cayenne pepper

## Directions

1. Wash and drain oysters.
2. Shake them over the fire until the gills curl.
3. Drain, saving the liquor.
4. Chop the oysters fine.
5. Rub together flour and butter.
6. Add enough oyster liquor and milk to make a pint.
7. Stir until boiling.
8. Add the oysters, the yolks of eggs slightly beaten, salt, a dash of cayenne, and chopped celery.
9. Turn into a baking dish, cover thickly with soft bread crumbs, and bake in a quick oven about ten minutes.

title: Divinity Fudge
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 cups sugar
- 1 1/2 cup karo syrup
- 1/2 cup water
- 2 eggs, whites
- 1 cup nut meats
- pinch salt
- flavoring

## Directions

1. Boil sugar, syrup and water till it forms a firm but not hard ball when dropped in cold water.
2. Pour slowly about half of this into the stiffly beaten whites of two eggs, into which have been put a pinch of salt and desired flavoring.
3. Put other half of syrup back on stove until it boils well again, then add slowly to the beaten mixture.
4. Add the nuts and pour into buttered platter.

title: Doughnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 tablespoons shortening
- 3 1/3 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 3/4 teaspoon cinnamon
- 3/4 teaspoon nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs until light
2. Add sugar and shortening (creamed) and milk
3. Sift the flour, add baking powder, spices and salt, and sift again
4. Add this gradually to mixture, stirring constantly
5. If necessary add more flour, enough to roll, but remember too much flour makes doughnuts tough
6. Knead one half mixture, and pat to one fourth inch thickness; cut out doughnuts with floured cutter
7. Test fat, when hot enough, put in two or three gently
8. When brown turn with a fork, once only
9. When done, pick one up with a fork (without piercing doughnut) and immerse quickly in pan of hot water, and drain
10. Reheat fat and test before using again
11. If fat is too hot, the doughnuts will sear over and not rise
12. Just before serving, roll in powdered sugar

title: Drawn Butter
body:
## Ingredients

- ¾ pound fresh butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- ½ cup hot water

## Directions

1. Cut up butter and mix with flour.
2. Place in saucepan and add hot water.
3. Cover the pan and place in boiling water.
4. Move pan around continually in the same direction, till butter is entirely melted and begins to simmer.
5. Then let pan rest till it boils up.
6. If set on too hot a fire, contents will be oily.
7. If not well mixed, the butter and flour will be lumpy.
8. Avoid too much water.

title: Dried Apple Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- 0.5 kilo dried apples
- 6 cups water
- 10 kalamansi
- sugar

## Directions

1. Wash apples, soak in water until soft, cook, drain in jelly-bag.
2. To four cups of juice, use four cups of sugar and juice of kalamansi.
3. Make as any jelly.

title: Duhat Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- duhat fruit
- water
- sugar, equal amount to juice
- lemon juice, 2 tablespoons to 4 cups of duhat juice

## Directions

1. Select the fruit when it is not perfectly ripe. Sort and wash.
2. Add just enough water to barely cover the fruit and cook until the fruit becomes soft and the juice well started.
3. Put the juice into a thin cotton bag, letting the juice drip through it into a porcelain or enamel receptacle. Let it drain for eight or twelve hours. Do not squeeze the bag or the jelly will be cloudy.
4. Measure your juice and an equal amount of sugar.
5. Place the juice only on the fire and let boil thirty minutes.
6. Add sugar and lemon juice. Stir until the sugar is thoroughly dissolved, and let boil ten minutes.
7. Test it by dropping a spoonful on a saucer and allowing it to cool quickly. As soon as it will jell, pour into glasses and set aside to cool.
8. After twenty four hours, seal with paraffin.
9. If the fruit is quite ripe, it will be necessary to boil the juice and sugar for thirty minutes. The time, from ten to thirty minutes, will depend upon the ripeness of the fruit.

title: Duhat Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- duhats, not quite ripe
- sugar, equal parts with juice
- lemon juice, 2 tablespoons to 4 cups juice of duhats

## Directions

1. Select the fruit when it is not perfectly ripe.
2. Sort and wash.
3. Add just enough water to barely cover the fruit and cook until the fruit becomes soft and the juice well started.
4. Put the juice into a thin cotton bag, letting the juice drip through it into a porcelain or enamel receptacle.
5. Let it drain for eight or twelve hours.
6. Do not squeeze the bag or the jelly will be cloudy.
7. Measure your juice and an equal amount of sugar.
8. Place the juice only on the fire and let boil thirty minutes.
9. Add sugar and lemon juice, two tablespoons lemon juice to four cups of duhat juice.
10. Stir until the sugar is thoroughly dissolved, and let boil ten minutes.

title: Egg Cutlets or Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 hard boiled eggs
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 cupful milk
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon chopped parsley
- 1 teaspoon salt
- dash pepper
- egg and bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Rub butter and flour into a ball and stir into the hot milk until dissolved.
2. Cook well, adding all other ingredients, parsley last.
3. Let stand until thoroughly stiff.
4. Form into cutlets or croquettes.
5. Dip into egg and crumbs.
6. Fry in wire basket in very hot fat.
7. For cutlets, add paper quill to end, to look like well served chop.

title: Egg Kisses
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 eggs, whites
- 1 pound granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites very light, add sugar
2. Mix quickly
3. Place paper (not buttered) on a pan turned upside down
4. Drop the mixture in spoonfuls, placed well apart
5. Bake from thirty to forty minutes in very moderate oven
6. When baked, slip paper off pan onto table
7. Slip knife under kisses and take at once off paper
8. These are fine filled with whipped cream, prepared as for Charlotte Russe

title: Egg Lemonade
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 3 cups water
- 1 bottle Tansan
- 3 lemons
- 1 egg

## Directions

1. Boil water and sugar ten minutes
2. Add the grated rind of one lemon, juice of three
3. Allow this to cool
4. At serving time add the egg, well beaten and the Tansan, poured from height in order that the mixture may foam
5. Serve with cracked ice

title: Egg Plant Relish
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 good sized onions
- 6 baked egg plants
- salt and pepper
- sugar to taste
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop onions very fine
2. Mix with it the mashed pulp of egg plants

title: Egg Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- bread and butter
- salt and pepper
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Hard-boil eggs
2. Cut moderately thin and place between some bread and butter cut as thin as possible
3. Season with salt, pepper and nutmeg

title: Egg Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons flour
- 2 hard-boiled eggs
- butter
- ½ cup warm water
- 1 pint boiling water

## Directions

1. Stir flour and butter together.
2. Gradually add the boiling milk, then chopped eggs.
3. Do not let sauce boil, but keep just under boiling point.
4. Pour a little over fish and serve rest separately.

title: Eggless Loaf Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups flour
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 tablespoon baking powder
- 3/4 cup butter
- 2 cups milk
- lemon or vanilla extract

## Directions

1. Cream sugar and butter
2. Sift together four times flour and baking powder
3. Mix all together with milk
4. Flavor
5. When cold, ice with Eggless Icing made of 1 cup sugar and five tablespoons milk
6. Stir until it boils, then boil five minutes without stirring, and beat until smooth and creamy

title: Eggs a la Caracas
body:
