## Ingredients

- 3/4 pound dried beef
- 2 tablespoons grated cheese
- 1 can tomatoes
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- eggs
- salt and pepper
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Mix shaved dried beef with thick part of canned tomatoes, grated cheese, onion juice, salt and pepper.
2. Pour into a pan in which the butter has been melted.
3. After all is well blended and thick, beaten eggs are stirred in.
4. Cook just long enough to set the eggs.

title: Egoless Fig Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup shortening
- 1 cup figs
- 1/2 cup milk
- 6 level teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 2 cups flour

## Directions

1. Cream the sugar, shortening and the figs, which have been put through a food chopper
2. Add the milk slowly
3. Add the nutmeg and the salt
4. Sift together baking powder and flour and add
5. Roll a quarter of an inch thick
6. Bake in a hot oven from twelve to fifteen minutes

title: English Drop Cakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 2 cups flour (before sifting)
- 3/4 cup butter
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 eggs
- flavoring
- walnut

## Directions

1. Drop from teaspoon into pans
2. A walnut on top of each drop cake is a pleasing addition

title: English Ginger Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter or 1/2 butter, 1/2 lard
- 1 1/2 cups granulated sugar
- 1 1/2 cups molasses
- 1 teaspoon hot water
- 3 level teaspoons ginger
- 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon
- 3/4 teaspoon soda
- flour to roll

## Directions

1. Cream the butter
2. Beat in the sugar, then the molasses
3. Stir in a little flour
4. Add the soda dissolved in the hot water with the rest of the flour
5. Keep the dough from getting too stiff
6. Make of a consistency to allow you to shape it with floured hands into small balls the size of a walnut
7. Place on greased baking sheet about two inches apart to allow for spreading
8. Flatten out slightly
9. Bake in moderate oven

title: English Monkey
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 cup minced cheese
- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 1 pint milk
- 1 egg
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Soak bread crumbs in milk, add cheese, butter, egg and seasoning.
2. Stir together until well cooked.
3. Serve on hot crackers.

title: Favorite Chicken Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 small chickens
- 1 cup rice
- ¾ pound fat pork
- 1 cup ripe tomatoes
- salt and pepper
- cold water

## Directions

1. Cut up chickens.
2. Cover with cold water and bring slowly to a boil.
3. Drain that water off and cover well with more.
4. When boiling, and the meat is getting tender, add washed rice and pork cut into small dice, and tomatoes pared and cut into pieces.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste and boil until the rice is well done.
6. This stew should be thick enough to dip, not to pour.

title: Feather Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup milk
- 2 cups sugar
- 3 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add milk and yolks of eggs well beaten
3. Sift flour three times, add baking powder last sifting
4. Add flour and lastly, the well beaten whites
5. Bake in three layers, put together with any good frosting or jelly

title: Fig Candy
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/3 cup water
- 1/4 teaspoon cream of tarter
- 1 pound figs

## Directions

1. Boil sugar and water until a light brown color.
2. Then stir in cream of tarter and take from fire.
3. Wash and cut open figs, spread them on platter and pour over them the mixture.
4. Set to cool until covering has hardened.

title: Fig Filling for Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup chopped figs
- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup water

## Directions

1. Place in double boiler and boil until thick.
2. Dates may be used in same way.

title: Fine Puff Paste
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart sifted flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup lard
- 1/2 cup ice water
- white of 1 egg

## Directions

1. Mix baking powder and salt with sifted flour and then sift again.
2. Have ready butter and lard, hard and cold; rub the lard smoothly into the flour, and add ice water with which the white of an egg has been mixed, and make a very stiff dough.
3. Roll into a thin sheet and spread on it one fourth the butter, dusting it with flour; roll up like a scroll, double the ends over to meet, flatten and roll again.
4. Repeat this until all the butter is used.
5. Put in an earthen dish and set in a cold place for an hour or more before making the pies.

title: Fish Chowder
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound of white fish
- 3 medium size potatoes
- 1 large onion
- 1 pint boiling water
- 1 pint of milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt
- pepper
- celery seed
- tomatoes
- powdered thyme

## Directions

1. Wash and cut in squares any white fish
2. Pare and cut into dice potatoes
3. Chop fine the onion
4. Put in the bottom of the kettle a layer of the potatoes, then a layer of fish, then tomatoes
5. Add a teaspoon of onion, 1/2 teaspoon thyme, a saltspoon of salt, a dash of pepper, 1/2 teaspoon celery seed, and so continue until the materials are all used
6. Have the top layer potatoes
7. Pour over a pint of boiling water, cover the kettle and cook over a moderate fire, without stirring, for twenty minutes
8. Meantime heat milk in double boiler
9. Take the chowder from the fire and cover the top with crushed water crackers
10. Pour over the milk, add butter, cut in bits, and serve

title: Fish Hawaiian Style
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pound haddock
- 1 large onion
- 4 tablespoons butter or olive oil
- 1 clove of garlic
- 2 potatoes
- 1 saltspoon ground cloves
- 3/4 can tomatoes
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 sweet chili pepper
- 1 level teaspoon salt
- 1 rounding tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Clean, wash and dry haddock, dust it with salt and pepper
2. Pour butter, or olive oil, into a shallow baking pan
3. When hot drop in the fish, brown on both sides
4. Put in hot oven and cook slowly for thirty minutes, turning once
5. While this is cooking put potatoes that have been peeled, tomatoes, grated onion, clove of garlic mashed, cloves and bay leaf in sauce pan; cook for five minutes
6. Press through a sieve
7. Add a level teaspoon of salt, a dash of cayenne, sweet chili chopped fine, and butter

title: Fish Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 lemons
- mayonnaise dressing
- 1 1/2 pint fish
- capers and anchovies

## Directions

1. Take cold cooked fish and break into flakes.
2. Pour juice of lemons over this.
3. Arrange crisp lettuce leaves to form a bed on round plate.
4. Lay fish upon it and over the top put a few capers and some fillets of anchovy.
5. Dress with mayonnaise and garnish with sliced lemon.

title: Fish Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint drawn butter
- 6 hard-boiled eggs
- 1 tablespoon pepper sauce or Worcestershire sauce
- sliced lemon
- salt

## Directions

1. To drawn butter add pepper or Worcestershire sauce, a little salt and hard-boiled eggs chopped fine.
2. Pour over boiled fish and garnish with sliced lemons.

title: Fish Stuffing
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup bread crumbs
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 3/8 teaspoon pepper
- 1/4 cup melted butter
- 1 teaspoon chopped onion
- 1 teaspoon chopped parsley
- 1 teaspoon capers
- 1 teaspoon pickle

## Directions

1. Mix well

title: Five-Three
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 lemons
- 3 cups sugar
- 3 oranges
- 3 quarts water
- 3 bananas
- Whites of 3 eggs
- Preserved cherries or pineapple

## Directions

1. Mix the juice of lemons and oranges with the fine banana
2. Put in freezer with water and sugar
3. Mix thoroughly
4. When half frozen beat the egg whites to stiff froth and stir into the sherbet
5. Finish freezing and serve with preserved cherries or pineapple

title: Fondant
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1/4 cup water
- flavoring

## Directions

1. Put sugar and water in sauce pan and stir on stove until sugar melts.
2. Remove grains of sugar around edges.
3. Boil without stirring.
4. Try in water.
5. When it makes a firm but not crisp ball, set in cold water till you can bear your fingers in it.
6. Stir and beat — knead as it begins to harden.
7. Put flavor in while creamy.
8. To this can be added chopped nuts, cocoanut or candied fruits.
9. Shape fondant into rolls and dip into melted chocolate for chocolate creams.
10. Handle rolls of fondant with tongs.

title: For the Chafing Dish
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups Eastern or California cheese
- 3 cups bread crumbs
- 3 cups milk
- 3 eggs
- 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce
- salt to taste
- paprika

## Directions

1. Soak bread in milk one hour before using.
2. Cut cheese in small pieces.
3. Let the cheese melt, cover with paprika, add bread and milk, then the eggs well beaten.
4. Serve on crackers or toast.

title: Forced Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- bread crumbs
- Worcestershire sauce
- salt and pepper to taste
- white of raw egg
- hot lard
- potato straws

## Directions

1. Hard boil eggs and cut in halves.
2. Remove yolks and season with salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce.
3. Replace in the holders.
4. Paste together with white of raw egg.
5. Roll in egg and bread crumbs.
6. Fry in hot lard to amber brown.
7. Serve on nest of potato straws.

title: French Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 saltspoon pepper
- 4 tablespoons olive oil
- 1 tablespoon vinegar or lemon juice

## Directions

1. Put salt and pepper in bowl, add slowly the oil, stirring all the time.
2. When salt is dissolved add vinegar.
3. When well mixed, serve.

title: French Rolls
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup yeast
- 1 quart milk
- 3 quarts flour
- 3/4 teaspoon soda
- 1 teacup hot water
- 1 mashed potato
- 2 tablespoons lard or butter
- salt and sugar to taste

## Directions

1. Mix together yeast, milk and flour.
2. When this is light add soda in hot water, potato, butter or lard, and flour enough to make a soft dough.
3. Add salt and sugar to taste.
4. Let rise four hours or until light; make it into rolls; let rise again and bake.

title: Fricassee of Oysters
body:
## Ingredients

- 50 oysters
- 1 pint liquor and milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 teaspoon salt
- cayenne pepper
- 2 egg yolks
- 4 tablespoons cream
- parsley

## Directions

1. Drain and wash oysters.
2. Cook until the gills curl.
3. Drain, saving the liquor.
4. Add to it sufficient milk to make a pint.
5. Put butter and flour in a saucepan and mix.
6. Add liquor and milk, and stir until boiling.
7. Add salt, cayenne pepper and the oysters.
8. Heat over hot water.
9. Beat the yolks of eggs with cream.
10. Stir them quickly into the oysters.
11. Take from the fire, and serve on toast, or in a dish, garnished with triangular pieces of toast.
12. Sprinkle finely chopped parsley over the top.

title: Fried Bananas
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 bananas
- 4 tablespoons milk
- 3/4 cup flour
- salt
- sugar
- water
- hot fat

## Directions

1. Use the banana called "Saba" for frying
2. Cut bananas in slices the long way
3. Dip in a batter made of flour, milk and a little salt
4. Fry in hot fat
5. Pour over the fried bananas a syrup made of sugar and water

title: Fried Chicken
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- 1 teaspoon lard
- 1 teaspoon butter
- salt
- flour
- hot water

## Directions

1. Wash the chicken thoroughly before cutting.
2. Afterwards lay in a pan to cool.
3. Have a thick, iron, frying pan piping hot.
4. Put in a spoonful each of lard and butter.
5. Fry the chicken very quickly until brown, then add just enough hot water to moisten and steam.
6. Set back on the stove, cover very tightly and steam until tender an hour or more as required.
7. Add salt just in time to let it penetrate well before serving.
8. The top may be dredged with flour just before adding the water.

title: Fried Eggplant
body:
## Ingredients

- eggplant
- cracker or bread crumbs
- 1 egg
- butter
- salt water

## Directions

1. Take fresh, purple eggplant; cut into slices a quarter of an inch thick
2. Soak for half an hour in cold salt water
3. Dry; dip in cracker or bread crumbs; then in beaten egg, more crumbs
4. Fry to a light brown
5. Do not remove from the water until ready to cook

title: Fried Fish
body:
## Ingredients

- fish
- salt
- pepper
- flour
- beaten egg
- bread crumbs
- hot lard or drippings
- tomato sauce
- sliced lemons

## Directions

1. Season with salt and pepper
2. Dredge with flour
3. Brush over with beaten egg
4. Roll in bread crumbs
5. Fry in hot lard or drippings sufficient to cover
6. When browned on one side, turn it over in the fat and brown the other
7. Drain when done
8. Serve with tomato sauce, garnished with sliced lemons

title: Fried Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- salt and pepper
- butter or lard

## Directions

1. Peel, slice and fry onions brown in equal quantities of butter, lard, or nice drippings.
2. Cover until partly soft.
3. Remove the cover and brown them.
4. Salt and pepper.

title: Fried Sweet Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- 1 coconut

## Directions

1. Slice the sweet potatoes one fourth of an inch thick.
2. Then fry with coconut oil, or other fat, until brown.
3. Pour over them a thick syrup and serve.

title: Fritters
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1⅜ cups flour
- 4 apples or bananas
- 1 tablespoon sugar

## Directions

1. Beat eggs
2. Add milk, flour, baking powder
3. Chop either apples or bananas
4. Add to the batter
5. The sugar may be added if desired
6. Fry in smoking hot lard

title: Frozen Apricots or Peaches
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can apricots
- 3 or 4 cups distilled water
- 1½ cups sugar

## Directions

1. Drain apricots and cut in small pieces
2. To the syrup add enough water to make four cups, and cook with sugar five minutes
3. Strain, add apricots and freeze

title: Frozen Mangoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 large mangoes
- 4 cups distilled water
- 1½ cups sugar
- 2 teaspoons lemon juice

## Directions

1. Peel mangoes and cut pulp from seeds; cut in small pieces and mash
2. Make syrup of sugar lemon juice and water, add mangoes and freeze
3. If desired add well beaten whites of two eggs when almost frozen

title: Fruit and Nut Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup nuts
- 3/4 cup citron
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup raisins (seeded)
- 1 cup currants
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- flour

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add well beaten eggs and milk
3. Chop nuts and citron; flour fruit before adding to mixture
4. Add flour enough to make thick batter
5. Bake in slow oven

title: Fruit and Nut Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup seeded raisins
- 1 cup chopped nuts

## Directions

1. Make a boiled icing and add the chopped raisins and nuts.
2. Save out a few nuts to sprinkle over top of cake.

title: Fruit Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 eggs
- 4 pounds raisins (whole)
- 4 pounds currants
- 1 pound citron
- 1 pound sugar
- 1 pound butter
- 1 pint molasses
- 1 pint brandy
- 1 pint sherry
- 1 bottle vanilla
- 1 tablespoon mace
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon cloves
- 3 nutmegs
- 1 pound flour

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar, add spices and yolks of eggs, well beaten, and molasses
2. Stir in flour and whites of eggs, well beaten, alternately
3. Just before adding fruit and brandy, take out enough batter to cover top of cakes
4. Use extra flour to flour fruit thoroughly, before adding to batter
5. Add brandy and sherry and bake in two pans for three hours, in moderate oven

title: Fruit Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 1 large cup raisins (stoned and chopped)
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon allspice
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- flour enough to roll

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients in order named
2. Bake in moderate oven

title: Fruit Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tablespoons citron
- 4 tablespoons raisins
- 3/4 cup almonds
- 1/4 pound figs
- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup sugar

## Directions

1. Beat the whites of eggs to stiff froth, add sugar.
2. Then thoroughly mix into this the whole of the chopped ingredients.
3. Put between layers of cake while it is hot.

title: Fruit Gelatine
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 pound dates
- 1/4 pound figs
- cherries or pineapple or bananas or orange
- 1 box gelatine
- 1/4 boiling water
- 1/2 pint cold water
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 lemons
- 1 orange

## Directions

1. Stone and chop dates, mix with equal amount of chopped figs; add candied cherries, or pineapple, or the pulp of orange, or sliced bananas.
2. The mixture must be sufficient to fill a quart and a pint mould.
3. Cover a box of gelatine with cold water and let it soak for half an hour.
4. Add to it the sugar and boiling water and stir until gelatine is dissolved; add lemon and orange juice.
5. Strain into the mould over the fruit and stand it aside to harden.
6. When cold and quite firm, turn it out upon a glass dish and serve with or without whipped cream.

title: Fruit Punch
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1 pint water
- 1 cup Maraschino cherries
- 2 quarts mineral water
- 1 lemon
- 2 bananas
- 1 pineapple

## Directions

1. Make syrup by boiling sugar, water and the grated rind of lemon
2. While hot, dice into it two bananas, grated pineapple and cherries
3. When ready to serve, put a block of ice in punch bowl and pour over it the mineral water, and add prepared juices

title: Fruit Punch
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup water
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup tea
- 2 cups strawberry juice
- 1 quart mineral water
- 1 can grated pineapple
- 5 lemons
- 5 oranges
- 1 cup Maraschino cherries

## Directions

1. Boil water and sugar to a syrup
2. Add tea, strawberry juice, lemon juice, orange juice pineapple
3. Let stand for half hour
4. Strain and add ice water to make one and one-half gallons
5. Add cherries, mineral water and ice just before serving

title: Fudge
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup milk
- 2 teaspoons butter
- 1/2 cake Baker's chocolate
- 1 teaspoon vanilla

## Directions

1. After milk and sugar are boiling, add chocolate.
2. Cook until it forms a soft ball in water.
3. Set out until cooled; then add vanilla and beat until creamy.
4. Pour into buttered tins.
5. When set, cut into squares.
6. Peanuts or pili nuts may be added, less butter with pili nuts.

title: Fudge Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- ⅛ cup milk
- ¾ tablespoon butter
- 1 square chocolate
- thin buttered bread

## Directions

1. Make fudge as usual
2. Beat until almost stiff
3. Before it hardens spread on thin buttered bread for sandwiches

title: Ginger Ale Punch
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 dozen large lemons
- 2 dozen pints ginger ale
- 2 large cans pineapple

## Directions

1. Mix lemon juice with both pulp (chopped very fine) and juice of pineapple
2. Fifteen minutes before serving put large piece of ice in punch bowl and pour punch over it
3. Use no water

title: Ginger Pears
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 pounds hard Chinese pears
- 6 pounds sugar
- juice 4 lemons
- 2 ounces native green ginger

## Directions

1. Peel, core and slice thin the pears.
2. Scrape the ginger and pass through the meat chopper.
3. Let all stand a short time to start the juice and then boil slowly about an hour.

title: Gingerbread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups molasses
- 1 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 3 teaspoons soda (heaping)
- 3 1/2 cups flour
- 1 cup boiling water
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- 1 teaspoon cloves

## Directions

1. Cream butter, add well beaten eggs, molasses and spices
2. Dissolve soda in water and add
3. Stir in flour
4. Bake in one pan

title: Golden Cream Toast
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 3 hard boiled eggs
- salt, pepper and mace

## Directions

1. Cut slices of stale bread diamond shaped and toast to a pale brown.
2. Make a rich white sauce of milk, butter, flour, salt to taste.
3. Cook until smooth and add the grated yolks of hard boiled eggs and pour over the toasted bread.
4. Add pepper and mace if the flavor is desired.

title: Grape Ambrosia
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups water
- Juice of 3 lemons
- 2 cups milk
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup grape juice
- Whites of 4 eggs
- ¾ can grated pineapple

## Directions

1. Mix milk with water, sugar and fruit
2. Partly freeze; add the beaten whites of eggs and continue to freeze until hard

title: Grape Fruit Marmalade
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 grape fruit
- 1 orange
- 1 lemon
- sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Slice the fruit very thin, and add three times as much water as fruit.
2. Let stand for twenty four hours.
3. Boil ten minutes.
4. Let stand again twenty four hours.
5. Then add sugar pound for pound (1 pint equals 1 pound).
6. Cook from one and a half to three hours.

title: Green Papaya Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 small green papayas
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- dash of pepper
- 3 tablespoons chopped walnuts
- 2 tablespoons grated cheese
- pimiento
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Peel papayas, cut into cross sections, remove seeds, and boil until tender.
2. Shave enough fine to mix with nuts and cheese.
3. Place in center of papaya, decorate with pimiento, and serve with mayonnaise.

title: Green Pepper Sandwich
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 green peppers
- ¾ cup grated cheese
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Scald peppers and put on ice to chill
2. When chilled, cut up fine and mix with grated cheese and mayonnaise

title: Green Tomato Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 pounds green tomatoes
- 4 pounds brown sugar
- 1 quart vinegar
- 1 teaspoon mace
- 1 teaspoon cloves
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Chop the tomatoes fine; add sugar and boil down three hours; add vinegar and spices, boil about fifteen minutes; let cool and put in jars or other vessel.

title: Greens (All Kinds)
body:
## Ingredients

- greens
- salt water
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Clean carefully through several washings of salt water.
2. Allow to stand in salt water a half hour or so.
3. Put in boiling water with a handful of salt; boil until the stalks are tender.
4. Cut away any tough stalks.
5. When tender, drain, chop them a little, and return to the fire long enough to season with salt, pepper and butter.
6. Vinegar may be added if it is liked.
7. Serve while hot.

title: Guava Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- guavas
- water
- white sugar, 1 cup for 1 cup of juice
- lemon or lime juice to taste

## Directions

1. Take ripe guavas, pare in quarters and drop into enough cold water to just cover them.
2. Boil until the fruit is thoroughly cooked.
3. Skim and add white sugar cup for cup — i.e. one cup of sugar for each cup of juice.
4. Let this cook slowly until the jelly is clear.
5. Add lemon or lime juice to taste; simmer one half hour longer.
6. Skim frequently, pour into wide necked bottles and seal when cold.

title: Ham Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- chopped ham
- ¾ cup butter
- 1 tablespoon mixed mustard
- 1 tablespoon salad oil
- pinch red or white pepper
- pinch of salt
- yolk of one egg
- thin slices of bread

## Directions

1. Rub the butter to a cream
2. Add salt, pepper, mustard and egg yolk
3. Mix thoroughly
4. Stir in as much chopped ham as will make it consistent
5. Spread between thin slices of bread
6. Omit salad oil and substitute melted butter if preferred

title: Ham Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can deviled ham
- butter the size of an egg
- 6 pickled cucumbers
- ⅛ teaspoon dry mustard
- little onion if desired
- thin slices of bread

## Directions

1. Mince the pickles and onions
2. Mix all together thoroughly
3. Spread thinly on thin slices of bread

title: Hashed Brown Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 pint boiled potatoes
- salt and pepper
- 3 tablespoons cream
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Chop cold boiled potatoes rather fine; to each half pint add three tablespoons cream, salt and pepper; mix.
2. Put a tablespoon butter into a shallow frying pan, and put in the potatoes.
3. Flatten them in a perfectly smooth layer; cook slowly until a golden brown.
4. Fold one half over the other and turn out on a heated dish.

title: Hermits
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 1 cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoon cloves
- 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg
- 2 cups flour
- 3/4 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 cup sour milk
- 1 cup chopped raisins
- 1 cup currants
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Mix soda and flour, add other dry ingredients and sift
2. Add butter, eggs slightly beaten and milk
3. Mold in enough more flour to roll out

title: Hollandaise Sauce for Fish
body:
## Ingredients

- butter
- juice lemon
- cayenne pepper
- 2 egg yolks
- juice ½ lemon
- ¼ teaspoon salt
- ¼ cup boiling water

## Directions

1. Cream the butter and the yolks, lemon juice, salt and pepper.
2. Place the bowl in a dish of hot water on the stove, and beat the mixture with an egg beater one minute.
3. Add the boiling water, beating all the time.
4. When of consistency of custard, it is done.

title: Hot Chocolate Sauce for Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 ounces Baker's chocolate
- ¾ cup milk
- 2 cups light brown sugar
- Butter size of walnut
- 1 inch length cinnamon bark
- Vanilla

## Directions

1. Melt chocolate over hot water; add sugar, cinnamon, milk and butter
2. Cook until it will form a soft ball when dropped on ice
3. Remove the cinnamon and add a little vanilla
4. Serve hot, pouring a little sauce on each dish of vanilla ice cream

title: Hot Slaw
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 head cabbage
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3/4 cup vinegar
- salt
- seasoning

## Directions

1. Cut cabbage fine, cook in salt water slowly one hour.
2. Drain off water.
3. Let simmer in one cup of vinegar and water fifteen minutes, add butter and seasoning to taste, and serve.

title: Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1½ cups sugar
- 1 large cup water
- Vanilla to taste

## Directions

1. To unbeaten eggs add sugar, slowly mix in cream, add water and flavor with vanilla to taste
2. Freeze

title: Ice Cream Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 1 egg yolk
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3 egg whites
- 1 cup prepared flour
- 1 teaspoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients for filling well and place on ice
2. For cake cream butter and sugar, add flour and well beaten whites and lemon juice
3. Bake twenty minutes in two layers

title: India Curried Onion
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 eggs
- 1 lemon
- 1 teaspoon curry powder
- salt

## Directions

1. Fry sliced onions in butter, salt well.
2. Add one teaspoon curry powder and stir in two raw eggs.
3. Add a few drops of lemon juice just before removing from fire.

title: Indian Curry Made from Curry Powder
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 onion
- 1 tablespoon curry powder
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 pint cold meat
- 1 cup cream or
- 1 coconut
- salt
- lemon or vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop onion very fine and mix with curry powder, working it up to smooth paste.
2. Brown this in butter till golden brown.
3. Add the meat cut in small cubes, and simmer slowly for a few minutes.
4. Season with salt, lemon or vinegar.
5. Add the milk or cream and bring to boil.
6. If cocoanuts are obtainable, grate coconut, pour half pint boiling water on it and press out all the milk.
7. You can use this instead of milk or cream.

title: Italian Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint milk
- 1 ounce gelatine
- 3 eggs
- flavoring
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- dash of salt

## Directions

1. Make custard of milk, egg yolks, sugar and salt.
2. When cooked enough to coat the spoon, add ounce of gelatine, which has soaked half an hour in some of the cold milk.
3. As soon as dissolved, remove from the fire, and when it begins to stiffen fold in carefully the whites of eggs whipped to a froth.
4. Turn into a mould to set.

title: Italian Custard
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- sugar
- currant jelly
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Beat yolks of eggs to a cream, and while beating add sugar and lemon juice to taste.
2. Beat until quite thick.
3. Pour into glass cups.
4. Beat the whites to a stiff froth, whip in enough currant jelly to give it color.
5. Heap the glasses with this and place on ice to chill.

title: Italian Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon tomato catsup
- dash of cayenne
- 4 tablespoons olive oil
- 1 clove of garlic
- 1 tablespoon vinegar

## Directions

1. Put salt, cayenne and catsup in a bowl; gradually add the oil, mixing all the time.
2. Add garlic that has been mashed to pulp and vinegar.

title: Jambalay
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup rice
- 1 large green pepper
- 1 small red pepper
- 1 onion
- 2 tomatoes
- 3 tablespoons tomato catsup
- ½ pound ham, chopped
- ½ pound sausage or ½ pound shrimp or ½ pound chicken
- 1 pint boiling water
- sprig parsley

## Directions

1. Wash rice and soak in cold water for one hour
2. Fry the other ingredients in Crisco, then add the boiling water
3. Stir in the rice and meat
4. Cover the pot and cook slowly for thirty minutes
5. Add salt
6. If it boils too low, add boiling water

title: Japanese Fritters
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- stale bread or cake
- powdered sugar or jelly
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Beat eggs
2. Add milk
3. Cut stale bread into fingers about one inch square and three inches long, free from crust
4. Put these slices into the milk and egg, and let soak until they have absorbed the milk
5. Drain carefully
6. Roll in bread crumbs
7. Place in wire basket and fry in hot fat
8. Serve with powdered sugar or with sauce or jelly
9. Stale cake can be used in the same way

title: Kidney Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 kidney
- 1 onion
- chopped parsley
- salt and pepper to taste
- flour
- water or milk
- rice

## Directions

1. Wash kidney thoroly, pulling off the thin skin and removing all membrane.
2. Cut into pieces the size of a walnut.
3. Wash again and squeeze out the blood.
4. More than cover with hot water and simmer slowly in a covered stew-pan two or three hours, until nearly done.
5. Take off the scum.
6. Add boiling water when necessary to keep the meat covered, and salt about fifteen minutes before removing from the fire.
7. Let the kidney cool in the juice and stand over night if convenient.
8. Take kidney from juice and cut into small pieces the size of lima beans.
9. Return to juice, add chopped onion, salt and pepper to taste, and boil slowly until thoroly done.
10. Thicken with a little flour mixed with water or milk.
11. Add chopped parsley and serve with rice.

title: Ladies' Cabbage
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 firm white cabbage
- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3 tablespoons rich milk or cream
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Boil cabbage fifteen minutes, changing the water from the boiling tea-kettle
2. When tender set aside to cool
3. When cold, chop fine and add two beaten eggs, butter, pepper and salt, and rich milk or cream
4. Stir all well together
5. Bake in buttered pudding dish until brown
6. Serve very hot

title: Lamb Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds lamb (fore-quarter)
- salt pork
- 2 onions
- flour
- 3 raw potatoes
- salt and pepper
- milk
- short biscuit dough
- water

## Directions

1. Cut up the lamb into small pieces removing the fat.
2. Wash it well and put it over the fire, with just enough cold water to cover it well, and let it heat gradually.
3. It should stew gently until partly done.
4. Then add a few thin slices of salt pork, one or two onions sliced, salt and pepper and two or three raw potatoes, cut up into inch pieces.
5. Cover it closely and stew until the meat is tender.
6. Drop in a few dumplings, made like short biscuit, cut out very small.
7. Cook fifteen minutes longer.
8. Thicken the gravy with a little flour moistened with milk.

title: Lanzone Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- lanzones
- mayonnaise
- lemon
- orange shells

## Directions

1. Carefully peel lanzones and divide into sections, removing all the inner skin.
2. Chill and dress with mayonnaise made with lemon instead of vinegar.
3. Serve in orange shells.

title: Lanzone Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- lanzones
- mayonnaise made with lemon instead of vinegar
- orange shells

## Directions

1. Carefully peel lanzones and divide into sections, removing all the inner skin.
2. Chill and dress with mayonnaise made with lemon instead of vinegar.
3. Serve in orange shells. If the oil is objectionable butter may be used with the other ingredients.

title: Latik
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cocoanuts
- 4 lumps native sugar
- water

## Directions

1. Extract milk from the meat of two cocoanuts
2. Place four lumps of native brown sugar in a stew-pan, add a little water place over the fire until sugar is melted
3. Strain thru cotton cloth
4. Pour the sugar into the coconut milk
5. Cook this mixture in a deep stew-pan, stirring occasionally, until thick enough to spread when cool

title: Lemon Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter and lard mixed
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup milk
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 teaspoon lemon extract
- flour (about 2 cups)

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add eggs well beaten and milk
3. Add flour and baking powder sifted together, and extract
4. Use flour enough to make stiff
5. Roll thin, cut out and bake

title: Lemon Ice
body:
## Ingredients

- Juice of 4 lemons
- 3 cups sugar
- 3 cups milk
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Freeze milk and sugar; add lemon juice and well beaten whites of eggs just before you finish freezing

title: Lemon Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 small cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 small tablespoon butter
- 1 cup hot water
- 1 lemon
- 4 eggs
- pinch of salt
- 4 tablespoons sugar

## Directions

1. Mix together sugar, butter, flour, juice and one half grated yellow rind of lemon, egg yolks, salt and hot water.
2. Cook until thick.
3. Put in baked crust.
4. Cover with whites of eggs beaten stiff with four tablespoons sugar.
5. Brown quickly and serve cold.

title: Lemon Sherbet— No. 1
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pound sugar
- 6 lemons (juice of 6, grated rind of 1)
- 1 quart water
- Whites of 5 eggs

## Directions

1. Add grated rind of one lemon to sugar
2. Add water and let boil five minutes
3. When cold add juice of six lemons
4. When partly frozen add well beaten whites of eggs

title: Lemon Sherbet— No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 4 lemons
- ¾ cup water
- 2 oranges
- Whites of 2 eggs
- 2 quarts water

## Directions

1. Boil sugar in one half cup of water until the syrup threads
2. Beat the whites of eggs to a stiff froth
3. Stir into this the thick syrup and put in freezer with the juice of lemons and oranges and two quarts of water
4. Freeze

title: Lemon Sherbet— No. 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 lemons
- Whites of 4 eggs
- 1 pint sugar
- 1 quart boiling water

## Directions

1. Shave off the peel from two lemons in thin wafer like shavings, being careful not to get the white part
2. Put parings in a bowl, add the boiling water and let stand ten minutes, closely covered
3. Add the juice and sugar to the water
4. Mix well, and when cold, strain into the can and freeze
5. The addition of beaten whites of two eggs when half frozen adds to the recipe

title: Liberty Steak Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 pounds beefsteak
- 1 pint milk
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 3 eggs
- salt
- onion
- parsley

## Directions

1. Chop beefsteak.
2. Add a little salt, onion, parsley, milk, flour and eggs.
3. Bake one hour in a quick oven.

title: Lima and Kidney Beans
body:
## Ingredients

- lima beans
- kidney beans
- water
- butter

## Directions

1. Put in boiling water, a little more than enough to cover them
2. Boil until tender, from half an hour to two hours
3. Serve with butter

title: Lucauan Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 hard boiled eggs
- 1 1/2 cups white sauce
- 1 cup cooked macaroni
- 3/4 cup grated cheese
- salt and pepper
- onion juice
- anchovy essence
- buttered crumbs

## Directions

1. Cut eggs in eighths lengthwise.
2. Add cooked macaroni, cheese, and white sauce seasoned with salt, pepper, onion juice and anchovy essence.
3. Turn into a buttered baking dish.
4. Cover with buttered crumbs.
5. Set in the oven long enough to bake crumbs.

title: Lucauian Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 hard boiled eggs
- 1½ cups white sauce
- 1 cup cooked macaroni
- salt and pepper
- ¾ cup grated cheese
- onion juice
- anchovy essence

## Directions

1. Cut eggs in eighths lengthwise.
2. Add cooked macaroni, cheese, and white sauce seasoned with salt, pepper, onion juice and anchovy essence.
3. Turn into a buttered baking dish; cover with buttered crumbs and set in the oven long enough to bake crumbs.

title: Lunch Eggs With Spinach
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 1 cup milk
- 2 cups of cold spinach
- 4 tablespoons grated cheese
- pepper, salt and butter
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Boil eggs very hard; cool and cut lengthwise.
2. Heat spinach in a few tablespoons of hot water, and rub thru a colander; mix with pepper, salt and butter; put in bottom of baking dish.
3. Lay the halves of egg about on the spinach and pour over them a sauce made from the milk thickened and seasoned with salt, pepper and cheese.
4. Cover with bread crumbs and set in oven.
5. Serve when slightly brown.

title: Lyonnaise Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- butter
- 1 onion
- salt and pepper
- 1 tablespoon minced parsley

## Directions

1. Dice potatoes.
2. Heat butter in a frying pan; fry in it one small onion until it begins to change color.
3. Put in the potatoes; sprinkle well with salt and pepper; stir and cook about five minutes, taking care not to break them.
4. They must not brown.
5. Just before taking up, stir in a tablespoon minced parsley.
6. Drain dry by shaking in a colander.
7. Serve very hot.

title: Macaroni and Tomato Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- macaroni
- soup stock
- cheese
- tomato sauce

## Directions

1. Prepare as macaroni à l'italienne; drain.
2. Arrange neatly on a hot dish.
3. Pour tomato sauce over it and serve while hot.

title: Macaroni À L'Italienne
body:
## Ingredients

- macaroni
- soup stock
- cheese

## Directions

1. Divide the macaroni into four-inch pieces.
2. Simmer fifteen minutes in plenty of boiling water, salted.
3. Drain.
4. Put the macaroni in a saucepan and turn over it a strong soup stock, enough to prevent it burning.
5. Strew over it some grated cheese; when the cheese is melted, dish.
6. Put alternate layers of macaroni and cheese; then turn over it the soup stock and bake half an hour.

title: Mango Butter
body:
## Ingredients

- mangoes
- white sugar
- brown sugar

## Directions

1. Select ripe mangoes and pass through a sieve.
2. Allow equal weight of sugar and mango, using half white and half native brown sugar.
3. Boil for three hours.

title: Mango Ice
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 large mangoes
- 4 cups distilled water
- 1½ cups sugar
- 2 teaspoons lemon juice

## Directions

1. Peel mangoes and cut pulp from seeds; cut in small pieces and mash
2. Make syrup of sugar lemon juice and water, add mangoes and freeze
3. If desired add well beaten whites of two eggs when almost frozen

title: Mango Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 large mangoes
- 2 cups cream
- 1½ cups sugar
- 2 cups distilled water

## Directions

1. Peal mangoes, cut from seeds in small pieces and mash
2. Make syrup by boiling sugar and water fifteen minutes, strain, add mashed mangoes, cool and freeze
3. When partially frozen add beaten cream

title: Mango Pie No. 1
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 mangoes, rather green
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 teaspoon vinegar
- 1 teaspoon spices
- 1 teaspoon butter

## Directions

1. Pare and slice fine mangoes, add sugar, flour, vinegar, spices and butter.
2. Bake with two crusts.

title: Mango Pie No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 green mangoes
- 1 1/2 cups sugar (or more)
- spice

## Directions

1. Peel and boil mangoes until tender.
2. Pour off water; slice mango from seed.
3. Mix with plenty of sugar, at least a cup and a half.
4. Add spice and fill into crust.
5. Cover and bake.

title: Mango Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- green mangos
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Pare green mangos and slice from the seed.
2. Boil in plenty of water for a few minutes; pour off the water and boil again, being careful that the fruit is not broken by boiling too long and hard.
3. After the last parboiling add a little water and sugar sufficient to sweeten.

title: Maple Frosting
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup maple syrup
- 2 tablespoons Karo corn syrup
- 2 egg whites

## Directions

1. Boil maple syrup and Karo corn syrup to 240 degrees F., or to the soft ball stage.
2. Pour in a fine stream on the whites of eggs, beating constantly meanwhile; beat occasionally until cold.
3. If the frosting does not hold its shape, set the bowl in a double boiler (over boiling water) and keep moving it from the bottom until it thickens perceptibly.
4. Leave it rough on cake.

title: Maple Syrup Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup shortening
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup maple syrup
- 3/4 cup hot water
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup ginger
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 3/4 cup hot water

## Directions

1. Beat shortening to a cream
2. Beat in one half cup of sugar, eggs, well beaten
3. Then add alternately, flour, baking powder, soda and ginger sifted together, and hot water
4. Bake in a pan about thirty-five minutes using a pan about ten and one half by seven inches
5. When cold, invert and cover the surface with maple icing and decorate with halves of nut meats

title: Marrow Balls for Asparagus Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon marrow
- 3 tablespoons bread crumbs
- 1 teaspoon chopped parsley
- salt and pepper to taste
- part of raw egg

## Directions

1. Mix together cooked marrow, bread crumbs, parsley, salt and pepper
2. Add enough raw egg to this mixture to insure the balls not coming to pieces in cooking
3. Form into balls the size of filberts
4. Roll in raw egg and fine bread crumbs or flour
5. Simmer in soup a few minutes before serving

title: Marshmallow Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- angel cake
- one large cup sugar
- whites of two small eggs
- marshmallows
- two-thirds vanilla
- one-third almond

## Directions

1. Bake angel cake in two layers
2. Make boiled icing of one large cup sugar to whites of two small eggs
3. Cut marshmallows in halves and put on coating of icing, then more icing
4. Flavor with two-thirds vanilla and one-third almond

title: Marshmallow Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- angel cake
- 1 large cup sugar
- 2 small egg whites
- marshmallows
- vanilla
- almond

## Directions

1. Bake angel cake in two layers
2. Make boiled icing of one large cup sugar to whites of two small eggs
3. Cut marshmallows in halves and put on coating of icing, then more icing
4. Flavor with two-thirds vanilla and one-third almond

title: Marshmallow Dessert
body:
## Ingredients

- pineapple
- 1 1/2 cups whipped cream
- marsh mallows
- maraschino cherries

## Directions

1. Mix equal parts of diced pineapple (no juice) and quartered marshmallows, and let stand in ice box twelve hours to swell.
2. When ready to serve add halved maraschino cherries.
3. Mix well and add whipped cream.
4. If the cream is not stiff enough add white of one egg beaten stiff.

title: Marshmallow Marguerites
body:
## Ingredients

- thin unsweetened crackers
- 1 small box marshmallows
- butter

## Directions

1. Take any variety of thin, unsweetened cracker, spread lightly with butter and set in a baking pan
2. On the center of each cracker put a marshmallow with a bit of butter above (the butter may be omitted)
3. Put the pan into a hot oven until the marshmallow is softened and browned a little
4. Serve at once

title: Marshmallows
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1/4 cup water
- 1 envelope gelatine
- 1 teaspoon flavoring

## Directions

1. Boil sugar and water until it forms a firm ball when dropped in water.
2. Let the gelatine soak in two thirds of a glass distilled water for about ten minutes, then add to boiling sugar as it is taken from the stove.
3. Add flavoring and beat until spongy and light.
4. Pour into slightly buttered platter and let stand until next morning.
5. Cut into cubes and roll in powdered sugar or cornstarch to prevent stickiness.
6. Nuts, raisins, chocolate or kind of flavoring may be used.

title: Marshmallows
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1/4 cup water
- 1 envelope gelatine
- two thirds of a glass distilled water
- 1 teaspoon flavoring

## Directions

1. Boil sugar and water until it forms a firm ball when dropped in water.
2. Let the gelatine soak in two thirds of a glass distilled water for about ten minutes.
3. Add gelatine to boiling sugar as it is taken from the stove.
4. Add flavoring and beat until spongy and light.
5. Pour into slightly buttered platter and let stand until next morning.
6. Cut into cubes and roll in powdered sugar or cornstarch to prevent stickiness.

title: Marshmellow Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/8 tablespoon gelatine
- 1 tablespoon cold water
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1/8 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 cup milk

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in water.
2. Beat the whites of eggs stiff and dry; beat slowly into them one fourth cup of sugar and the gelatine which has been dissolved over boiling water.
3. Add flavoring that is desired and mould in small cups.
4. Stand on ice, and unmould at serving time by dipping the outside of the cup in hot water.
5. Serve with whipped cream, or a spoonful of crushed fruit, or a custard made from the yolk of two eggs, milk and one fourth cup of sugar, cooked in double boiler.

title: Mashed Camote Biscuit
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sifted flour
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 tablespoons shortening
- 1 cup mashed camote
- liquid to make a soft dough

## Directions

1. Sift all dry ingredients.
2. Cut or rub fat into dry ingredients.
3. Rub the camote into this mixture.
4. Add just enough milk or water to make the mass cling together.
5. Do not knead.
6. Place on floured board, roll to about two centimeters thickness; cut with round biscuit cutter, place on a lightly floured biscuit tin and bake fifteen to twenty minutes in a moderately hot oven.

title: Mayonnaise Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks of two eggs
- olive oil
- vinegar or lemon juice
- salt
- black pepper
- cayenne pepper
- mustard

## Directions

1. Beat yolks of eggs constantly; add olive oil drop by drop, until enough to stand alone.
2. As the mixture becomes thick drop in slowly a little vinegar or lemon juice; thicken again with oil.
3. So proceed until the required amount of dressing is obtained.
4. Season to taste with salt, black and cayenne pepper and mustard.

title: Meat Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- beef (topside or sirloin)
- salt

## Directions

1. Select a thick piece of topside or sirloin, and with a dull knife scrape with the grain of the meat, leaving all the stringy white fibre behind.
2. Roll this pulp into balls about the size of small marbles.
3. Have a clean, smooth frying pan.
4. Sprinkle a little salt in it; shake until brown; then lay in four balls at a time, and with a spoon keep them rolling and turning for just a minute or two.
5. The salt gives them a delicious flavor, while they will be rare inside and delicately brown outside.

title: Meat Souffle
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup minced meat
- 1 egg
- 1 teaspoon chopped parsley or celery
- pinch cayenne pepper
- 1 saltspoon salt
- 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Beat egg separately
2. Mix the meat, yolk of egg and seasoning and beat thoroughly
3. When ready for oven, fold in the white of egg and sprinkle with cracker crumbs
4. Bake fifteen minutes
5. Garnish with slices of lemon

title: Meringue
body:
## Ingredients

- whites 3 eggs
- 2 tablespoons Highland cream
- 3 level tablespoons granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites until thoroughly stiff but not dry; add gradually the sugar beating the while
2. Set this on the ice until thoroughly chilled, not less than half an hour
3. Just before serving, add cream, as you would oil in mayonnaise dressing
4. This is a delicious meringue to whip into cold custard or to serve dropped into iced chocolate

title: Mince Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can Heinz mince meat
- 1/2 box raisins
- 1/2 can S & W apples
- 1/2 pound citron

## Directions

1. Combine ingredients and fill into crust and bake.

title: Minced Lamb
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint chopped lamb
- ½ pint milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 tablespoon chopped mint
- ¾ teaspoon salt
- dash of cayenne
- 6 slices toast
- 6 eggs

## Directions

1. Rub butter and flour together and the milk and seasoning
2. Cook until boiling
3. Add the mint and lamb
4. Place over hot water while you make the toast
5. Trim toast, butter and cover each slice with a thick layer of minced lamb, leaving a hole in center
6. Poach six eggs
7. Put one in each center

title: Mocha Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup coffee
- 1 pint milk
- 6 eggs
- 6 tablespoons sugar
- 1/8 teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Put strong, clear coffee with milk in double boiler
2. Beat yolks of eggs, sugar and salt
3. Mix well, then add milk
4. Turn back into boiler and stir ten minutes, till thick like cream
5. Cool quickly

title: Mock Charlotte
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pint boiling water
- 1/4 pint milk
- 1 cup sugar
- yolks 2 eggs
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 2 teaspoons sugar
- 3 tablespoons corn starch
- white 4 eggs
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Take boiling water, sugar and vanilla, thicken with moistened corn starch.
2. Pour this over the beaten whites of four eggs.
3. Set on ice.
4. For the custard: Take milk, yolks of eggs, sugar and vanilla.
5. Pour the boiling milk gradually over the eggs, bring to a boil, but remove immediately from the fire to prevent curdling.

title: Mock Cream Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 pint milk
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 tablespoons flour
- pinch salt
- small piece butter
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat sugar, flour and egg yolks together.
2. After the milk has come to a boil add the mixture, salt and butter.
3. After it has cooled, place in baked crust and sprinkle over it a little nutmeg.
4. Place meringue over top and brown in oven.

title: Mock Terrapin
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint fowl
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- salt and pepper
- ¾ pint milk
- 3 egg yolks
- 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce

## Directions

1. Rub together butter, flour and seasoning, add milk; stir until boiling
2. Add this to the hard boiled yolks of eggs, rubbing all the while
3. When you have a smooth yellow sauce, add the cold cooked fowl, which has been cut in cubes of an inch
4. Serve very hot

title: Molasses Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup cold tea
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 cup flour
- pinch salt

## Directions

1. Combine ingredients
2. Bake in shallow pan

title: Molasses Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 2 1/2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Cream sugar and butter
2. Add beaten egg, molasses and milk
3. Stir in flour sifted with baking powder
4. Bake twenty minutes
5. Baked in layers and filled with boiled icing is very delicious

title: Mongo Bean Sprout
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart mongo bean sprout
- 1 onion
- french dressing

## Directions

1. Cook mongo bean sprout in salt water only a few minutes.
2. Pour off water and set to cool.
3. When ready to serve, slice onion over top and serve with French dressing.

title: Mongo Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup mongo
- 1½ quarts water
- salt, pepper and other seasoning

## Directions

1. Wash mongo.
2. Cover with water and let it stand in water all day.
3. Drain.
4. Add water, salt, pepper, and any other desired seasoning, and simmer until the mongo is tender (about two hours).
5. Press through a sieve.
6. Add onion.
7. Serve.

title: Mongo Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup mongo
- 1.5 quarts water
- salt, pepper and other seasoning
- onion

## Directions

1. Wash mongo
2. Cover with water and let it stand in water all day
3. Drain
4. Add water, salt, pepper, and any other desired seasoning
5. Simmer until the mongo is tender (about two hours)
6. Press through a sieve
7. Add onion

title: Mongos and Rice
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup mongos
- 2 tablespoons lard
- 3/4 cup rice
- 1 onion
- 1 1/2 cups stewed tomatoes
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Wash mongos, cover with cold water and bring to a boil.
2. Drain, rub off husks, cover with boiling water and cook until tender.
3. Boil rice in a separate stewpan.
4. Slice onion and saute in hot lard until clear and tender, but not brown.
5. Add boiled rice, boiled mongo and stewed tomato.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Heat thoroughly and serve while hot.

title: Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 1/2 cups sweet milk
- salt
- 1 1/2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 tablespoon butter or lard
- flour

## Directions

1. Beat eggs and milk with sufficient flour to make a moderately stiff batter.
2. Add baking powder, melted butter or lard, and salt.
3. Bake quickly.

title: Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup milk
- 3 cups flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. To the beaten egg add butter, sugar and salt, all beaten until light.
2. Then add milk, flour, and baking powder.
3. Drop on well greased patty pans and bake twenty minutes in a quick oven.

title: Mushroom Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- beef tongue
- mushrooms
- French mustard
- bread

## Directions

1. Mince beef tongue and mushrooms together
2. Add French mustard
3. Spread between bread

title: Mushroom Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 mushrooms
- ¼ tablespoon lemon juice
- 1 tablespoon butter
- ¼ teaspoon salt
- ¼ tablespoon chopped onion
- 1 cup hot water or stock
- 1 tablespoon flour

## Directions

1. Melt the butter, and stir into it the flour and onion.
2. Then pour in the hot water or stock, a little at a time.
3. Put through a strainer and add salt and mushrooms.
4. Stir and cook long enough for the mushrooms to become thoroughly heated, and just before serving add lemon juice.

title: Muskmelon Frappe
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 small melon
- gelatine
- sugar to taste
- water

## Directions

1. Cut small melon in half
2. Remove the seeds, membrane and as much pulp as may be removed easily, cutting it into small pieces
3. Put seeds and membrane in sieve to drain and to this add sugar to taste, a little gelatine prepared in the usual way and a little water
4. Freeze and at serving time fill the melon shells, which should be ice cold, with alternate layers of the pulp and frappe

title: Mustard Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 teaspoons sugar
- 2 teaspoons mustard
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon pepper
- 4 tablespoons vinegar

## Directions

1. Take yolks of eggs, salt, sugar, mustard, pepper and butter, mix thoroughly and stir in slowly the vinegar.
2. Cook in double boiler, stirring occasionally until thickness of cream.

title: New Orleans Jambalaya
body:
## Ingredients

- 36 fresh shrimps
- thyme
- 1 onion
- bay leaf
- 1 tablespoon lard
- parsley
- 1 cup rice
- pepper and salt

## Directions

1. Boil shrimps.
2. When cold peel.
3. Cut onion fine.
4. Fry in lard.
5. Add rice well washed to the onion.
6. Let it fry brown, stirring constantly.
7. Flavor with thyme, bay leaf, parsley, pepper and salt.
8. When brown, add enough water to cover.
9. Let boil until the rice is well cooked.
10. Mix with the shrimps and serve.

title: Nut and Cheese Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- grated cheese
- English walnuts
- salt
- cayenne pepper
- thin slices of bread

## Directions

1. Mix equal parts of grated cheese and chopped English walnut meats
2. Season with salt and cayenne
3. Spread on thin slices of bread
4. Especially good with brown bread

title: Nut Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups graham flour
- 3/4 cup molasses
- 1 cup white flour
- 2 cups sour milk
- 2 cups English walnut meats
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 cups seedless raisins
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in 2 teaspoons hot water
- 3/4 cup sugar
- large pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Mix and sift dry ingredients, add nuts and raisins.
2. Add molasses, milk, and soda dissolved in water.
3. Bake forty five minutes in slow oven.

title: Nut Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 1 1/2 cup sugar
- 3 cups flour
- 4 eggs
- 1 pound dates, chopped
- 1 pound English walnuts, chopped
- 1 teaspoon soda dissolved in 3 tablespoons hot water

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add eggs
3. Add flour
4. Add dates and walnuts
5. Dissolve soda in hot water and add
6. Bake

title: Nut Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- pinch of salt
- 4 tablespoons milk
- 1 cup ground hickory nuts
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar; add eggs, flour, baking powder, salt, milk and nuts; flavor with vanilla.
2. Drop a teaspoonful on buttered pans about two inches apart; if too thick, add a little more milk.

title: Nut Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup English walnuts, chopped fine
- 1 dozen cherries, chopped fine
- 3 tablespoons cherry juice

## Directions

1. Mix and add to plain ice cream, omitting vanilla
2. Freeze

title: Nut Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 lb. English walnuts
- celery
- mayonnaise
- lettuce

## Directions

1. Crack nuts, blanch and set aside to cool.
2. Chop and mix with celery cut into small pieces.
3. Serve on lettuce. Dress with mayonnaise.

title: Nut Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup apples
- 1 cup walnuts
- 1 cup celery
- mayonnaise
- perfect red apples
- crisp bleached celery tops

## Directions

1. Cut apples, celery and nuts in small pieces.
2. Blend lightly with mayonnaise.
3. Take hollowed out shells of perfect red apples and fill with mixture.
4. Place a teaspoon of mayonnaise on top of each and serve with a border of crisp, bleached celery tops.

title: Nut Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- peanuts
- jelly
- bread

## Directions

1. Mix apricot jelly or any tart jelly with chopped peanuts
2. Spread between bread

title: Oatmeal Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 2 1/2 cups uncooked Quaker Oats
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar.
2. Add yolks of eggs.
3. Add Quaker Oats, to which baking powder has been added, and add vanilla.
4. Beat whites of eggs stiff and add last.
5. Drop on buttered tins with a teaspoon, but very few on each tin as they spread.
6. Makes about sixty-five cookies.

title: Old Fashioned Potato Doughnuts
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 cups sugar
- 3/4 cup milk
- 4 eggs
- 5 cups flour
- 5 teaspoons baking powder
- cooked potatoes
- cinnamon or nutmeg

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes, mash dry and add other ingredients
2. Sift baking powder with the flour
3. Use cinnamon or nutmeg to flavor
4. Roll, fry in lard, and sprinkle with sugar

title: Old Fashioned Potato Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 medium sweet potatoes
- 1 pint rich milk
- 3 eggs
- 1/3 cup butter
- pinch of salt
- cinnamon, cloves, or nutmeg

## Directions

1. Grate potatoes on a coarse grater.
2. Add milk, eggs well beaten, butter and salt.
3. Flavor with cinnamon, cloves or nutmeg.
4. Put into a hot buttered baking dish and cook until done.

title: Olive Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart olives (stoned)
- 1 dozen hard boiled eggs
- mayonnaise dressing
- thin slices of bread

## Directions

1. Chop together olives and eggs
2. Moisten with mayonnaise
3. Spread between thin slices of bread

title: Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- milk
- butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Beat separately yolks and whites of required number of eggs.
2. To the yolks add salt and pepper and one tablespoon of milk for each egg.
3. Mix well and add stiffly beaten whites.
4. Mix well and cook in hot well-buttered frying pan.
5. When brown, fold and serve.

title: Orange Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 1 orange
- 1 egg
- 2 cups flour
- 4 level teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Cream the butter, add the sugar gradually and grated rind of orange.
2. Add without separating yolk and white, one fourth cup of orange juice and flour and baking powder sifted together.
3. A little more flour may be needed to roll into a sheet.
4. Cut into squares, set in baking pan, dredge with granulated sugar and bake in a moderate oven.

title: Orange Filling
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups powdered sugar
- 1 orange
- 2 egg whites
- 3/4 lemon

## Directions

1. Mix sugar with beaten whites of eggs, the juice and grated rind of orange and juice of lemon, flavoring with orange extract.
2. Spread between layers.
3. Ice top with boiled icing and decorate with sections of mandarin oranges.

title: Orange Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/4 box gelatine
- 1/4 cup cold water
- 1 cup sugar
- 3 cups boiling water
- 3 oranges
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Soak gelatine in cold water half an hour; add sugar and boiling water and stir until dissolved.
2. Grate the peel of two oranges and squeeze the juice of three on the peel.
3. Let stand for half an hour, while gelatine is dissolving, and then strain into jelly.
4. Turn into halved orange skins as moulds.
5. Serve in skins with whipped cream on top of each.

title: Orange Marmalade No. 1
body:
## Ingredients

- small yellow oranges, size of limes
- water
- sugar

## Directions

1. Take small yellow oranges the size of limes. Peel and cover with water, letting them stand all night.
2. In the morning pour off the water.
3. Take out every seed if you desire sweet marmalade; if you like it bitter, leave some seeds. Be careful to save all the juice.
4. To every cup of the fruit add three cups of water.
5. Then to every cup of this mixture add one cup of sugar and boil until it jellies.
6. Put a little in a saucer on ice and don't boil beyond the jelly point, if you want it clear.

title: Orange Marmalade No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 oranges
- 3 grape fruit
- 3 lemons
- 10.5 pounds white sugar
- 4 quarts water

## Directions

1. Cut all fruit very fine; soak in water over night.
2. Cook two hours; add sugar, and cook until stiff.

title: Orange Marmalade No. 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 dozen sour oranges
- 2 lemons, juice
- 5 pounds sugar
- 1.5 pints water

## Directions

1. Pare the oranges without cutting through the white skin.
2. Prick them and boil until tender.
3. Also boil separately the yellow peel until tender.
4. Then shred peel with scissors.
5. Chop the oranges, carefully removing the seeds and hard bits of skin.
6. Boil the water and sugar to a thick syrup.
7. Put in the oranges and the juice of lemons and shredded peel.
8. Boil one half hour.

title: Orange Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 large oranges
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 pint boiling milk
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch

## Directions

1. Peel the oranges; cut in thin slices, removing the seeds
2. Put in a pudding dish and sprinkle over one cup of sugar
3. Beat egg yolks with cornstarch and two tablespoons of sugar; add salt and stir into boiling milk
4. When it thickens remove from the fire and when cold spread over oranges
5. Beat the whites of the eggs with two heaping tablespoons of sugar and put over pudding
6. Serve cold

title: Orange Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- whites 3 eggs
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 2 oranges
- 1 lemon

## Directions

1. Beat whites of eggs until stif
2. Add sugar gradually
3. Add grated rind of orange and fruit juices

title: Orange Sherbet
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 oranges
- 1 pint sugar
- 2 lemons
- 2 tablespoons gelatine
- 1 pint cold water
- 1 teaspoon orange extract

## Directions

1. Mix juice with one pint of cold water; add sugar; stir in the gelatine soaked in cold water, and flavor with extract
2. Freeze

title: Orange Shortcake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups flour
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 egg
- 3 tablespoons butter or lard
- 1/3 cup plus 1 tablespoon milk
- nutmeg
- butter
- oranges
- orange sauce

## Directions

1. Mix dry ingredients and sift well
2. Work in shortening with fingers, egg well beaten and milk
3. Bake in layer cake pan
4. Split and spread with butter
5. Cover with oranges which have been cut in small pieces and have stood an hour with plenty of sugar
6. Serve with orange sauce

title: Oyster Cocktail
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint raw oysters
- 1 cup tomato ketchup
- 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce
- 1 teaspoon grated horse-radish
- juice of 1 lemon
- tobasco sauce to taste

## Directions

1. Take oysters, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce and grated horseradish, the juice of a lemon and enough tobasco sauce to make very hot.
2. Put in glasses and place on ice to cool.

title: Oyster Cocktails in Peppers
body:
## Ingredients

- peppers
- oysters
- 1 tablespoon tomato catsup
- 1 teaspoon horseradish
- 1 teaspoon prepared mustard
- 6 drops Worcestershire sauce
- dash paprika
- shredded cabbage
- French dressing

## Directions

1. Select bullnosed peppers, one for each guest, slice off stem end and remove all seeds and white membrane.
2. Fill with oysters and a sauce made of catsup, horseradish, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and a dash of paprika.
3. Set each pepper in a wreath of shredded cabbage with French dressing.

title: Oyster Gumbo
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 chicken
- 1 quart chicken stock
- 1 sliced onion
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1½ pints water
- 1 teaspoon paprika
- 1 quart young okra
- dash cayenne
- 50 oysters

## Directions

1. Prepare a chicken as for fricassee.
2. Put in baking pan.
3. Add onion, half pint of water and bake until tender.
4. Wash and cut okra into thin slices.
5. Put in a saucepan, add pint of water and cook slowly for half hour.
6. Lift the chicken to a soup kettle.
7. Add chicken stock or boiling water.
8. Simmer gently for twenty minutes.
9. Add salt, cayenne, paprika.
10. Add okra and oysters.
11. Cover the saucepan, cook for five minutes, and send to the table.

title: Oyster Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint oysters
- 2 tablespoons cold butter
- 1 cup milk or cream
- cayenne and salt
- 1 tablespoon flour

## Directions

1. Heat oysters in their own liquor until they begin to ruffle.
2. Skim out the oysters into a warm dish.
3. Add to the liquor the milk or cream, butter, pinch of cayenne and salt.
4. Thicken with flour stirred to a paste.
5. Boil up and add to the oysters.
6. Served with fish, boiled turkey or white meats.

title: Oyster Stew
body:
## Ingredients

- 50 oysters
- salt and pepper
- 1 quart milk
- 2 tablespoons butter

## Directions

1. Drain, wash and drain again, good, fat oysters.
2. Shake over the fire until the gills curl.
3. Heat milk in double boiler.
4. Add hastily to the oysters.
5. Take from the fire.
6. Add salt, pepper and butter.
7. Serve with oyster crackers.
8. If thickening is liked, rub one tablespoon of butter and one of flour together and add to the milk.

title: Papaya Apple Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- large green papayas
- sugar
- juice of one lemon

## Directions

1. Select large green papayas in the market
2. Peel and cut in small pieces as with green apples
3. Cook until very soft
4. Remove from stove and put in a very little sugar and the juice of one lemon
5. Beat until very soft and smooth
6. Put in the ice box to cool and serve with roast pork or roast goose

title: Papaya Cocktail
body:
## Ingredients

- papaya
- juice of one large lemon
- 2 tablespoonfuls Heinz tomato catsup
- 1 tablespoonful Worcestershire sauce
- cracked ice

## Directions

1. Cut papaya in small pieces.
2. Mix with juice of one large lemon, two tablespoonfuls of Heinz tomato catsup, and one tablespoonful of Worcestershire sauce.
3. Serve with cracked ice.

title: Papaya Cocktail
body:
## Ingredients

- Papaya cut in small pieces
- juice of one large lemon
- two tablespoonfuls of Heinz tomato catsup
- one tablespoonful of Worcestershire sauce
- cracked ice

## Directions

1. Serve with cracked ice.

title: Peach Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- peaches
- 3 pints sugar
- 1 quart vinegar
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 1 teaspoon cloves

## Directions

1. Wash peaches well, let soak over night; place over a slow fire and cook until tender.
2. Have a syrup as for crab apple pickles, and place the peaches in the syrup, let them come to a boil and bottle or put in jars.
3. If syrup is not sweet enough, add sugar to taste.

title: Peanut Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 3/4 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 2 1/2 tablespoons milk
- 3/4 cup chopped peanuts
- 3/4 teaspoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cream the butter, add sugar gradually; add well beaten egg.
2. Mix and sift baking powder, salt and flour; then add milk, peanuts, and lemon juice.
3. Drop on buttered sheets an inch apart.
4. Bake twelve to fifteen minutes in a slow oven.

title: Peanut Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 4 tablespoons milk
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 1/2 cups ground peanuts

## Directions

1. Cream butter; mix well with sugar; add eggs and milk; then flour, baking powder and salt sifted together.
2. Add nuts and flavoring.
3. Bake in little drop cakes.

title: Pepper Hash
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 green peppers
- 12 red peppers
- 12 onions
- 1.5 pints vinegar
- 2 cups sugar
- 4 tablespoons salt

## Directions

1. Remove seeds from peppers; chop peppers and onions fine; cover with boiling water and let stand a few minutes; drain.
2. Add vinegar, salt and sugar.
3. Boil up thoroughly once and it is finished.

title: Peppermints
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup granulated sugar
- 3/4 cup cold water
- 1 pinch cream tartar
- peppermint to taste

## Directions

1. Boil sugar, water and cream of tartar three minutes, or until it begins to thread.
2. Remove from fire.
3. Add peppermint to taste.
4. Beat it until it begins to thicken.
5. Drop on waxed paper.

title: Perfection Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 envelope Knox gelatine
- 1/2 cup cold water
- 3/4 cup mild vinegar
- 1 pint boiling water
- 1 teaspoon salt
- juice 1 lemon
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 cup finely shredded cabbage
- 2 cups chopped celery or tomatoes
- 3/4 can sweet red peppers
- mayonnaise dressing

## Directions

1. Soak the gelatine in cold water five minutes.
2. Add vinegar, lemon juice, boiling water, sugar and salt.
3. Strain and when beginning to set add remaining ingredients.
4. Put on ice for twenty-four hours, and serve with mayonnaise dressing.

title: Pickle
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 green papaya
- 2 small green peppers
- 2 green tomatoes
- 1 small onion
- ginger root, small piece
- garlic, small piece
- 1 cup vinegar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon vinegar

## Directions

1. Chop fine, or better still, put through a meat chopper, papaya, peppers, tomatoes, onion, ginger root and garlic.
2. Boil fifteen minutes or until tender, in vinegar, salt and sugar.
3. When cooked, cover and let cool in its own steam.

title: Picnic Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- ⅔ cupful milk
- ½ cupful bread crumbs
- 1 cupful cooked ham
- ⅓ teaspoon dry mustard
- 1 raw egg
- 6 hard boiled eggs

## Directions

1. Put milk on the fire with bread crumbs until bread has absorbed milk.
2. Take from fire and add finely chopped ham, dry mustard and raw egg.
3. Put this mixture around each hard boiled egg, place in wire basket and fry.
4. Wrap in paraffine paper and take to picnic.

title: Pili Nut Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 cups flour
- 6 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 cup pili nuts, broken in fourths
- 2 eggs
- 1 cup milk

## Directions

1. Mix together flour, baking powder, salt and sugar; sift; add nuts.
2. Add milk and eggs beaten together.
3. Put in buttered pans two loaves, and let stand twenty minutes.
4. Bake half an hour.

title: Pineapple And Sago Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon sago
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1/3 cup boiling water
- 3/4 cup shredded pineapple

## Directions

1. Soak sago over night
2. Stir soft sago with boiling water, cook twenty minutes
3. Add sugar, and stir until dissolved
4. Shred the pineapple with a fork and pour sago over it
5. Cover with a meringue and brown slightly in the oven

title: Pineapple Conserve
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint chopped pineapple
- 3 oranges, juice
- 1 orange rind, candied
- 1 teacup English walnuts, chopped

## Directions

1. Chop pineapple in meat chopper with medium knife.
2. Add sugar and orange juice.
3. Let simmer over a slow fire until the consistency of jam.
4. When nearly cold, add candied rind and nut meats, also passed through meat chopper.

title: Pineapple Ice Cream— No. 1
body:
## Ingredients

- ⅓ can grated pineapple
- 2 tablespoons orange juice
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- Sugar to taste

## Directions

1. Drain off the juice from half a can of grated pineapple, mix with it lemon and orange juice
2. Mash the pineapple pulp through a strainer, taking only what will go through easily
3. Mix the sifted pulp with the juice and add sugar to taste
4. Mix this with partly frozen plain ice cream and finish freezing

title: Pineapple Ice Cream— No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 ripe pineapple
- juice 1 lemon
- ½ cup to pint of fruit

## Directions

1. Pare a fresh, ripe pineapple, remove the eyes and core, then chop fine and sprinkle with half a cup of sugar to a pint of fruit
2. Let it stand for half an hour, then press through a strainer
3. Add lemon juice and more sugar if needed
4. Mix with half frozen ice cream (plain) and finish freezing

title: Pineapple Ice Cream— No. 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart of cream
- Sugar
- 1 large pineapple

## Directions

1. Pare and grate the pineapple
2. Place in a deep dish and sprinkle with sugar
3. Cover and let stand three hours
4. Then press through a sieve
5. Stir into the cream and beat well
6. Freeze

title: Pineapple Lemonade
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pineapple
- 4 lemons
- 2 cups sugar
- 2 cups water

## Directions

1. Pare and grate pineapple
2. Add the juice of lemons and syrup
3. Mix and add one quart of water
4. When quite cold strain and ice

title: Pineapple Parfait
body:
## Ingredients

- ⅓ box gelatine
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 2 cups pineapple juice and pulp
- 2 cups cream
- whites 4 eggs
- Sliced pineapple, whipped cream and maraschino cherries

## Directions

1. Soften gelatine in a little cold water, then dissolve over hot water
2. Mix sugar and pineapple and add dissolved gelatine; blend thoroughly; then fold in the beaten whites of eggs
3. Beat until mixture begins to thicken, then add cream beaten stiff
4. Turn into a mould and pack in ice
5. When ready to serve, unmold and garnish with slices of pineapple, whipped cream and cherries

title: Pineapple Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup cream
- 5 eggs
- 1 pineapple

## Directions

1. Beat butter and sugar to a cream.
2. Add beaten yolks, then grated pineapple and cream, and lastly the beaten whites whipped in lightly.
3. Bake with under crust only.

title: Pineapple Preserves
body:
## Ingredients

- pineapples
- sugar

## Directions

1. Peel and cut into very thin slices fresh pineapples.
2. Cover with sugar and let stand an hour or two.
3. Add more sugar and cook until the preserves are thick and waxy.

title: Pineapple Punch
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup grated pineapple
- 3⅜ quarts water
- 3 oranges
- 3 lemons
- 1 cup grape juice
- 2 cups sugar
- 1½ cup tea

## Directions

1. Take pineapple and one pint of water and cook for fifteen minutes
2. Strain through cheese cloth
3. Boil sugar and one pint water for ten minutes
4. Add freshly made tea, lemon juice, orange juice, grape juice and two and one-half quarts water
5. Place in punch bowl with large block of ice

title: Pineapple Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pineapple
- 1 apple
- 3/4 cup mayonnaise
- 18 green grapes
- cream cheese
- lettuce leaves

## Directions

1. Cut out inside of pineapple in small pieces, being careful not to break the shell, cut apple into small pieces.
2. Mix grapes, apple and pineapple with mayonnaise and replace in pineapple shell.
3. Serve on lettuce leaves and garnish with cream cheese balls size of marbles.

title: Pineapple Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- pineapple
- butter

## Directions

1. Cut white bread into thin slices and remove the crust
2. Butter well
3. Chop pineapple very fine and drain off the juice
4. Sprinkle the minced fruit over the bread
5. Press down firmly and cut in squares

title: Pineapple Sherbet— No. 1
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can grated pineapple or 1 quart fresh fruit
- 1 tablespoon gelatine
- 1 tablespoon extract lemon
- 1 pint sugar
- 1 pint water

## Directions

1. Mix well pineapple, sugar, water, gelatine dissolved in hot water, and lemon extract
2. Freeze

title: Pineapple Sherbet— No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint grated pineapple juice
- 1 lemon
- 1 cup water
- 1½ cups sugar
- whites 2 eggs

## Directions

1. To juice and pulp of pineapple add lemon, water and sugar
2. Dissolve the sugar in water, add lemon juice, let it boil up and strain clear
3. When cold, stir in the pineapple and freeze
4. When partially frozen stir in the well whipped whites of two eggs

title: Pineapple Sherbet— No. 3
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart sugar
- 1 quart shredded pineapple
- 1 quart hot water
- 4 lemons
- whites 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Boil sugar and hot water to syrup
2. Add pulp and juice of pineapple and juice of lemons
3. Add water enough to make a gallon freezer two-thirds full
4. When half frozen add the well beaten whites of eggs
5. Freeze with plenty of salt and ice

title: Plain Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups flour
- 3/4 cup butter
- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup milk
- 3 eggs
- 3 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Cream butter and eggs
2. Add the well beaten yolks and milk
3. Sift flour three times, sifting baking powder the last time, and add
4. Lastly, fold in the well beaten whites

title: Plain Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3/4 cup cream
- 1 cup sugar
- 3/4 cup water
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3 cups sifted flour

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Beat eggs separately
3. Add the yolks, then milk and flour, baking powder sifted in flour, and whites of eggs
4. Bake in one pan

title: Plain Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup butter
- 2 cups sugar
- 3 eggs
- 1 orange
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- flour enough to roll

## Directions

1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add eggs well beaten, juice of orange, baking powder and enough flour to roll out nicely
3. Bake in moderate oven

title: Plain Ice Cream (Foundation)
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint milk
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 pint cream
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Scald the milk; mix the sugar, flour and eggs together and make a soft custard
2. When cold stir in the cream and freeze

title: Plain Pie Crust
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 1/2 cups sifted flour
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup lard
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 large teaspoon baking powder
- 3/4 cup cold water

## Directions

1. Rub the shortening into the flour, sifted with baking powder and salt, and mix with water.
2. Mix as little as possible and handle very lightly.

title: Plain Stuffing
body:
## Ingredients

- bread
- 1 egg
- melted butter
- onions
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Use bread at least a day old
2. Crumble fine, mixing in one egg and enough melted butter to have it crumble and be moist in the hands
3. Season highly with salt and pepper

title: Pop Corn
body:
## Ingredients

- pop corn
- 1 tablespoon lard
- 1/2 teaspoon salt

## Directions
