1. Into a large deep frying pan put a tablespoon of lard or butter and half a teaspoon salt.
2. Heat pan and when very hot throw in a handful of pop corn and cover.
3. Shake pan gently while corn is popping.
4. When corn is all popped the fat will be gone.

title: Pop Corn Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- bowl of popped corn
- 4 tablespoons water
- 1/2 cup granulated sugar

## Directions

1. Put sugar and water in saucepan and place on hot part of stove.
2. Boil until the syrup hardens when tested in cold water.
3. Place pan where syrup will keep warm but not boil.
4. Pick up pop corn one by one and dip into the syrup and stick together, adding more and more until a ball is formed.
5. Harden in a cool place.

title: Pot Roast
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 pounds beef rump or topside
- 3 cups boiling water
- 1 small onion
- flour
- salt and pepper to taste
- butter

## Directions

1. Wash and put beef into a pot with barely sufficient water to cover it.
2. Set over a slow fire and after it has been stewed an hour, salt and pepper.
3. Then stew slowly until tender, adding a little onion if liked.
4. Do not replenish the water at the last, but let it nearly boil away.
5. When tender, pour the gravy into a bowl; put a large lump of butter in the bottom of the pot; then dredge the meat with flour and return it to the pot to brown, turning it often to prevent burning.
6. Remove the fat from the gravy and pour it in with the meat.
7. Stir in a large spoonful of flour, wet with a little water.
8. Let it boil up 10 or 15 minutes and pour into a gravy dish.
9. Serve hot.

title: Potato Chowder
body:
## Ingredients

- bacon slices
- potatoes, sliced
- water
- crackers
- diluted cream

## Directions

1. Into a stew pan put some slices of bacon.
2. When hot put in sliced potatoes.
3. Add enough water to cover.
4. After the water has boiled down add crackers.
5. Cover with diluted cream and simmer until done.

title: Potato Croquettes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint mashed potatoes
- salt and pepper
- 4 tablespoons milk or cream
- grating of nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- 2 eggs
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Put cold mashed potatoes in a saucepan; add milk or cream, salt, pepper, onion juice and nutmeg; stir and beat until smooth and hot.
2. Take from the fire; add yolks of two eggs and form into cylinder-shaped croquettes.
3. Beat the white of one egg and to it add a tablespoon water; roll the croquettes in this, then in bread crumbs and fry in hot fat.

title: Potato Pancakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 or 5 large potatoes
- 1 egg
- 1 small grated onion
- salt to taste

## Directions

1. Wash, peel and grate four or five large potatoes with a small grated onion, one beaten egg and salt to taste.
2. Stir well.
3. Fry in thin pancakes in lard, covered up, as this will make them nice and crisp and prevents the fat from being all over the stove.
4. Always stir the batter again before taking out for the next panful.

title: Potato Puff
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint mashed potatoes
- 2 egg whites
- 3/4 cup milk

## Directions

1. Put cold mashed potatoes in a saucepan; add milk; stir and beat until the potatoes are hot and smooth.
2. Take from fire; fold in the well-beaten whites of two eggs.
3. Heap in a baking dish and brown quickly in a hot oven.
4. Serve with roast or broiled beef.

title: Potato Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 potatoes
- 1 onion
- 1/2 cup mayonnaise
- 1 tablespoon vinegar
- celery
- pimiento

## Directions

1. Boil potatoes in salt water.
2. When cool, peel and dice.
3. Cut onion very fine and mix with potato.
4. Sprinkle vinegar over the potato and set away to get cold.
5. Just before serving add mayonnaise. Celery and pimiento add to the salad.

title: Potato Yeast
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 medium sized white potatoes
- 3½ cups water
- 1 tablespoon hops
- 2 teaspoons salt
- 2 tablespoons sugar

## Directions

1. Cook potatoes in two and a half cups water.
2. Take the potatoes from the water, mash them very fine and return them to the water in which they were boiled, which should be about two cups.
3. While the potatoes are cooking, boil one level tablespoon of hops in a cup of water and strain the water.
4. Add one cup of the hop water to the potatoes, and stir into the mixture two teaspoons of salt and two tablespoons of sugar.
5. Put this mixture into a jar, cover it, and let it stand until the potatoes rise to the top, which will be in about two days.

title: Potatoes Au Gratin
body:
## Ingredients

- cold boiled potatoes
- cream sauce
- salt and pepper
- cheese

## Directions

1. Chop cold boiled potatoes rather fine; season with salt and pepper.
2. Put them in a baking dish; pour over sufficient cream sauce to just cover.
3. Dust the top with grated plain or Parmesan cheese, and put in a hot oven until nicely browned.

title: Pound Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 lb. fresh Holland butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 6 eggs
- 3/4 teaspoon nutmeg
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- 2 cups flour
- 1 tablespoon brandy

## Directions

1. Cream sugar and butter
2. Add the egg yolks (seven, if small) well beaten
3. Add flour sifted three times, baking powder sifted in last sifting
4. Have whites beaten very stiff and fold in
5. Lastly, add brandy
6. Bake thirty-five to forty minutes in moderate oven — if coal stove, take forty-five minutes

title: Preserved Mangoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cups mangoes
- 4 cups sugar
- 1 cup water

## Directions

1. Carefully peel ripe mangoes and cut from seed in lengthwise strips.
2. Boil sugar and water until it threads from the spoon, then drop in the mangoes, and boil until they become waxy in appearance.

title: Preserved Mangoes (Spiced)
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cups mangoes
- 4 cups sugar
- 1 cup water
- 1 tablespoon allspice
- 1 tablespoon cloves
- 1 tablespoon nutmeg

## Directions

1. Carefully peel ripe mangoes and cut from the seed in lengthwise strips.
2. Boil sugar and water till it threads from the spoon, then drop in the mangoes and the spices tied in a cotton bag.
3. When a fireless cooker is not used, cook the mangoes in the syrup from thirty to forty-five minutes or until they become thoroughly cooked and assume a waxy appearance.

title: Prune Meringue Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 pound prunes
- 3/4 cup sugar
- cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Soak, stew and stone prunes.
2. Sweeten and flavor with lemon juice; add a little cinnamon.
3. Line the pan with good paste, fill with prunes and bake until done.
4. Draw the pie to the mouth of the oven and spread with a meringue made with well beaten white of eggs and one spoon of sugar.
5. Brown.

title: Prune Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 dozen large prunes
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- whites 5 eggs
- 1/2 teaspoon cream tarter
- pinch of salt
- whipped cream

## Directions

1. Take stewed prunes, run through a colander
2. Beat eggs and whip in powdered sugar, with salt and cream tarter
3. Bake twenty minutes in pan of hot water
4. Serve with whipped cream

title: Prune Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- prunes
- walnuts
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Stew prunes until they are soft, without any sugar.
2. Cut carefully on the side and remove the pit.
3. Place a piece of English walnut inside and serve with mayonnaise dressing.

title: Prune Soufflé
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 pound stewed prunes
- 4 tablespoons powdered sugar
- yolks 3 eggs
- whites 6 eggs

## Directions

1. Remove the stones from prunes, press through a sieve
2. Add to them the yolks of three eggs slightly beaten with powdered sugar
3. Fold in the beaten whites of six eggs
4. Turn into a baking dish
5. Dust the top with powdered sugar
6. Bake in a quick oven for five or six minutes, then send immediately to the table in the dish in which it was baked
7. Serve with whipped cream

title: Puffed Wheat Balls
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 tablespoons syrup
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- pinch of soda
- 1 box puffed wheat

## Directions

1. Boil syrup, sugar and butter together until brittle in water.
2. Add pinch of soda.
3. Pour over puffed wheat and quickly form into balls, like pop corn balls.

title: Puffed Wheat Brittle
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1 box puffed wheat

## Directions

1. Put sugar in smooth granite sauce pan, place on stove, and stir constantly until melted to a syrup, keeping it away from sides of pan.
2. Spread puffed wheat on buttered tin and pour syrup over it.

title: Pumpkin Pie No. 1
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 tablespoons stewed pumpkin
- 1/2 pint rich milk
- salt
- cinnamon or nutmeg

## Directions

1. Stew pumpkin, cut into small pieces, in half pint of water, and when soft mash fine with potato masher.
2. Let the water dry away, watching closely to prevent scorching or burning.
3. For each pie take one well beaten egg, half cup sugar, two tablespoons pumpkin, half pint rich milk, little salt.
4. Stir well together, and season with nutmeg or cinnamon.
5. Bake with under crust in hot oven.

title: Pumpkin Pie No. 2
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup pumpkin or squash
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup sugar
- 1 large teaspoon flour
- 1 tablespoon molasses
- pinch salt
- 2 cups milk
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon

## Directions

1. Mix well pumpkin or squash with sugar, molasses, beaten eggs, flour, salt, cinnamon and about two cups of milk
2. place in crust and bake

title: Puree of Peas
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can or pint of shelled peas
- 2 cups white stock (made of veal or chicken)
- 2 cups milk
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Proceed as with corn soup.

title: Puree of Tomato Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can tomatoes
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1½ teaspoons butter
- 1 tablespoon salt
- 3/4 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup canned cream
- 1⅜ tablespoons sugar

## Directions

1. Boil tomatoes twenty minutes.
2. Strain.
3. Mix together flour and butter.
4. While tomatoes are boiling stir in flour and butter.
5. Add soda and cream, diluted with half water, salt and sugar.
6. Serve almost immediately.

title: Quick Tomato Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can tomatoes
- 1 slice onion
- some celery
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 teaspoon sugar
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 saltspoon pepper
- 1 saltspoon soda

## Directions

1. Put tomato, onion and celery into a sauce pan.
2. Cover.
3. Bring to a boiling point.
4. Add flour and butter rubbed together.
5. Stir carefully until mixture boils and thickens.
6. Add sugar, salt, pepper and soda.
7. Press through a sieve.
8. Reheat and serve.

title: Raisin Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup seeded raisins
- 1 cup water
- 1 cup sugar
- juice 1/2 lemon
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- pinch salt

## Directions

1. Boil all together five minutes
2. put in crust and bake

title: Raw Beef Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- beef
- salt and pepper
- very thin slices of bread

## Directions

1. Cut juicy, lean beef into thin strips
2. Scrape the pulp from them
3. Season highly with salt and pepper
4. Spread between very thin slices of bread

title: Remnants
body:
## Ingredients

- cold meat
- 1 egg
- cracker crumbs
- stock or gravy
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Take remnants of cold meat, grind or chop very fine, salt and pepper to taste.
2. Add one well beaten egg and one third as much cracker crumbs as chopped meat.
3. Add stock or gravy enough to moisten.
4. Steam in well buttered cups until thoroughly heated.

title: Rhode Island Ginger Snaps
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup molasses
- 2 teaspoons butter
- 1 tablespoon hot water
- 1 teaspoon ginger
- 1 teaspoon saleratus
- flour

## Directions

1. Boil the molasses, add butter, ginger and saleratus
2. Dissolve the saleratus in tablespoon hot water and put into molasses while boiling
3. Stir in the flour when it is hot
4. Roll thin
5. Bake quickly

title: Ribbon Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- green olives
- cheese
- pimientos
- cream or salad dressing
- graham bread
- white bread

## Directions

1. For first filling, cut green olives from the stones and put through food chopper
2. For second filling, put cheese and pimientos in equal amounts through food chopper and mix
3. If not sufficiently moist add cream or salad dressing
4. Cut the desired amount of graham bread and white bread into thin slices as for ordinary sandwiches
5. Beginning with the graham bread, put first the olive filling, then a slice of white bread, then the cheese filling, alternating the kinds of bread and fillings until five slices of bread have been used
6. Press the bread together and cut down through all the slices of bread, making sandwiches about three-fourths of an inch thick, the width of the slice and five layers high

title: Rice and Cheese
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups water
- 3/4 cup grated cheese
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce
- 1/4 cup cream
- dash of red pepper

## Directions

1. Cook rice for twenty minutes.
2. Make a sauce with grated cheese, salt, Worcestershire sauce, red pepper and cream.
3. Place alternate layers of rice and cheese in dish and bake.

title: Rice Snowballs
body:
## Ingredients

- boiled rice
- 3 eggs
- 1 pint of milk
- 1 teaspoon corn starch
- lemon flavoring

## Directions

1. Boil rice and mould in a cup until cold
2. Make a custard of eggs, milk and cornstarch
3. Flavor with lemon
4. When cold pour over rice balls half an hour before using

title: Ripe Cucumber Pickles
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 or 4 large ripe cucumbers
- syrup as for crab apple pickles
- cold salted water

## Directions

1. Select large ripe cucumbers
2. Cut lengthwise and remove the seeds
3. Pare and cut in strips three inches long and one and one half inches wide
4. Put into sauce pan and cover with cold salted water, place on slow fire and bring to a boil; be careful not to cook too long
5. Remove from the water and let drain
6. When quite dry, have ready a syrup as for crab apple pickles and place cucumber pieces in a jar and pour the boiling syrup over them
7. Let stand a few days before using

title: Roast Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- rib or loin roast
- butter or suet fat
- salt and pepper
- sifted flour
- boiling water

## Directions

1. Place your rib or loin roast in a dripping pan and baste it well with butter or suet fat.
2. Set in the oven.
3. Baste frequently with its own drippings.
4. When partly done, season with salt and pepper; then dredge with sifted flour to give it a frothy appearance.
5. Remove when done.
6. Skim the drippings from all fat.
7. Add a tablespoon of sifted flour, a little pepper and teacupful of boiling water.
8. Boil up once and serve hot in a gravy boat.
9. Seven or eight pounds require about two hours.

title: Roast Beef
body:
## Ingredients

- beef
- flour
- salt and pepper
- 1 cup boiling water
- butter or suet fat

## Directions

1. Place your rib or loin roast in a dripping pan and baste it well with butter or suet fat.
2. Set in the oven.
3. Baste frequently with its own drippings.
4. When partly done, season with salt and pepper; then dredge with sifted flour to give it a frothy appearance.
5. Remove when done.
6. Skim the drippings from all fat.
7. Add a tablespoon of sifted flour, a little pepper and teacupful of boiling water.
8. Boil up once and serve hot in a gravy boat.

title: Roast Duck
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 duck
- butter
- flour
- 3 pints bread crumbs
- 2 onions, chopped
- 6 ounces butter or part butter and part salt pork
- 1 teaspoon sage
- 1 teaspoon black pepper
- 1 teaspoon salt
- salt and water

## Directions

1. Pick, draw, clean thoroughly, and wipe dry
2. Cut the neck close to the back
3. Beat the breastbone flat with a rolling pin
4. Tie the wings and legs securely and stuff
5. Do not stuff very full
6. Sew up the openings firmly to keep the flavor in and the fat out
7. Place in a baking pan with a little water
8. Baste frequently with salt and water
9. Turn often that it may be nicely browned
10. When nearly done baste with butter and a little flour
11. Young ducks take from twenty-five to thirty minutes; full grown, an hour or more
12. Serve with jelly or tart sauce

title: Roast Goose or Roast Duck with Chestnut Stuffing
body:
## Ingredients

- goose
- 1 onion
- 1 orange
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 1 tablespoon currant jelly
- 1 pint large Spanish chestnuts
- 2 teaspoons milk
- fresh butter
- salt and pepper
- giblets

## Directions

1. Select a young plump goose or duck
2. Mince the giblets with a spoonful of fresh butter and a small onion
3. Add to gravy a tablespoon of currant jelly and juice of an orange
4. Boil chestnuts
5. Peel and mash with fresh butter, pepper and salt and milk
6. Stuff the goose with this

title: Roast Mutton
body:
## Ingredients

- mutton
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- flour
- water
- currant jelly or other tart sauce

## Directions

1. Wash and dry with a clean cloth.
2. Lay in dripping pan and add a little water to baste it with at first.
3. Afterwards baste with its own gravy.
4. Allow in roasting about 12 minutes to a pound, if fire is strong as it should be.
5. When it begins to roast well, salt and pepper.
6. Baste often.
7. About a quarter of an hour before you think it will be done, dredge with flour and baste with butter.
8. Skim the gravy well and thicken very slightly with brown flour.
9. Serve with currant jelly or other tart sauce.

title: Roast Steak
body:
## Ingredients

- beefsteak
- 1 pint boiling water
- 1 teaspoon pepper
- 1 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 onion
- 1 teaspoon butter

## Directions

1. Put a very thick piece of steak into the baking pan in boiling water.
2. Add pepper and salt, onion and butter.
3. Roast one hour if wanted well done, or less time if preferred rare.

title: Roast Turkey
body:
## Ingredients

- turkey
- salt and pepper
- stuffing
- lard or butter
- giblets

## Directions

1. Stuff the breast first, but not too full, or it will burst in cooking
2. The body should be stuffed rather fuller than the breast
3. Sew the openings with strong thread
4. Rub thoroughly with salt and pepper, then lard it or butter it over the breast
5. Place in a hot oven at first, then graduate to a moderate heat until the turkey is done, allowing about twenty minutes for each pound and twenty minutes additional
6. Boil the giblets until tender in a separate vessel
7. Chop fine and add to gravy

title: Rocks
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups brown sugar
- 1 scant cup butter
- 3 eggs
- 1 cup raisins
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 1 level teaspoon soda
- 1/4 cup hot water
- 1 cup nuts

## Directions

1. Mix sugar and butter, add eggs, flour, soda dissolved in hot water, raisins and nuts; flavor.
2. Drop off the spoon onto buttered tins.

title: Rolled Oat Muffins
body:
## Ingredients

- 2/3 cups rolled oats
- 1 cup scalded milk
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 3 tablespoons shortening
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 4 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 egg

## Directions

1. Turn scalded milk on oats, let stand five minutes; add sugar, salt and melted shortening; sift in flour and baking powder, mix thoroughly and add egg well beaten.

title: Roselle Jelly (a)
body:
## Ingredients

- roselle calyxes
- water
- sugar, equal amount to juice

## Directions

1. Wash the calyxes well, put them into a saucepan of granite ware with just enough water to cover the calyxes; boil until soft.
2. Strain the mass through a jelly bag.
3. Measure the juice and add an equal amount of sugar.
4. Cook until jelly is formed which will be in ten or twenty minutes.

title: Roselle Jelly (b)
body:
## Ingredients

- roselle calyxes, 2 heaping liters
- water, 1 liter
- sugar, 1/2 liter per liter of juice

## Directions

1. Wash the calyxes well, add one liter of water to two heaping liters of calyxes and boil until soft.
2. Strain through a jelly bag.
3. To each liter of juice add one-half liter of sugar.
4. Dissolve the sugar in the juice, then cook over a slow fire about twenty minutes or until the syrup jellies.
5. Do not stir the syrup while boiling.

title: Roselle Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- water, 1 liter
- seeded calyxes, 4 liters

## Directions

1. Use one liter of water to four liters of seeded calyxes.
2. Cook to a jam, cool and sweeten to taste.

title: Rusks
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 cups sifted flour
- 3 teaspoons baking powder
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 3 tablespoons sugar
- 3/4 nutmeg (grated)
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 2 cups milk
- 4 eggs

## Directions

1. Take sifted flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, nutmeg and cinnamon, mix these together; add milk and well beaten eggs.
2. Mix into a soft dough with floured hands; make into round balls; rub the tops with sugar and water, and sprinkle with dry sugar and cinnamon.
3. Bake immediately.

title: Russian Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- cooked vegetables such as potatoes, carrots, beets
- peas
- string beans
- mushrooms
- canned sweet pepper
- French dressing
- mayonnaise

## Directions

1. Cut all the larger cooked vegetables such as potatoes, carrots, beets, etc., into pretty forms.
2. Alternate all these with French dressing.
3. It is very pretty to put the mayonnaise in the bottom of the salad dish and arrange the vegetables, each into a section by itself, alternating the pretty colors.
4. Serve with mayonnaise.

title: Rye Pancakes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup rye
- ½ cup wheat flour
- 2 level teaspoons soda
- ½ teaspoon salt
- buttermilk

## Directions

1. Sift together dry ingredients
2. Add enough buttermilk to make batter

title: Salad Dressing
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 3 teaspoons oil
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon mixed mustard
- 2 teaspoons powdered sugar
- 3 teaspoons cream

## Directions

1. Boil eggs until hard; pound yolks to a smooth paste.
2. Add oil little by little, and all other ingredients, stirring until all are thoroughly incorporated.

title: Salmon and Cucumber Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can salmon
- mayonnaise
- 1 green cucumber

## Directions

1. Drain oil from salmon, pick it apart, remove skin and bones.
2. Select a green, crisp cucumber; pare and cut in thin slices and soak in salt ice water one hour.
3. Drain dry and mix with salmon.
4. Serve with mayonnaise.

title: Salmon Loaf
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can salmon
- 1 egg
- 3/4 cup milk
- 3/4 cup bread or cracker crumbs
- salt and pepper
- 1 cup milk
- 2 tablespoons flour
- 1 tablespoon butter

## Directions

1. Drain off the liquor for the sauce, pick out the bones, mash salmon fine with a spoon, add the eggs well beaten, melted butter, grated bread crumbs, and salt and mix well.
2. Steam three-quarters of an hour either in a mould or a bag.
3. Add to the liquor from salmon milk, flour, egg, a little salt, and boil until it thickens.
4. Slice the loaf, pour the sauce over slices, and garnish with bits of parsley and slices of lemon.

title: Salt Codfish with Macaroni
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 ounces macaroni
- 1/2 pound boneless codfish
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1/2 pint strained tomato
- 1/2 tablespoon grated onion
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1 saltspoon white pepper

## Directions

1. Break macaroni into two inch lengths
2. Throw them into boiling water and boil rapidly for thirty minutes
3. Drain
4. Blanch for fifteen minutes in cold water; then cut in pieces half inch long
5. Wash codfish, cut into dice and cover with cold water
6. Bring just to the boiling point
7. Drain
8. Cover again with boiling water, and let it stand for five minutes, then drain
9. Rub together butter with flour
10. Add strained tomato, onion, salt and pepper
11. Stir until boiling
12. Add macaroni and fish
13. Stand over hot water five minutes and serve in a heated dish

title: Salt Mackerel
body:
## Ingredients

- salt mackerel
- butter
- lemon juice

## Directions

1. Wash the fish and soak over night with the skin side up.
2. Next morning dry, put in wire broiler and broil, flesh side down, until a golden brown.
3. Turn and broil the skin side quickly.
4. Put on heated platter, moisten with butter that has been rubbed with an equal quantity of lemon juice, and serve.

title: Salt Rising Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 tablespoon corn meal
- ½ cup scalding milk
- 2½ pints warm water
- 1 teaspoon salt
- pinch of soda
- flour

## Directions

1. Stir corn meal into scalded milk at night.
2. Set in warm place; in the morning take a pint of warm water, a pinch of soda, and make a stiff batter.
3. Stir in the mixture that has stood over night; beat well; set in a kettle of warm water at an even temperature.
4. It should be light in two hours.
5. Then add one and a half pints of warm water, salt and sufficient flour to work into loaves.
6. Knead until smooth; put into bread pans and set over warm water or in some warm place to rise.
7. Then bake.

title: Sand Tarts
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- blanched almonds or pine nuts
- 1 tablespoon sugar

## Directions

1. Cream the butter, add sugar gradually and egg well beaten; then flour mixed and sifted with baking powder.
2. Chill, toss on floured board and roll one eighth of an inch thick.
3. Shape with a doughnut cutter.
4. Brush over with white of egg and sprinkle with sugar mixed with cinnamon.
5. Split nuts and arrange three halves on each at equal distances.
6. Place on buttered sheet and bake eight minutes in slow oven.

title: Santol Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- santols
- sugar, equal parts with juice

## Directions

1. Wash the fruit thoroughly. Cut up without paring into eighths, taking out the seeds.
2. Barely cover the fruit with water and boil until the fruit is soft.
3. Squeeze the fruit through a cloth.
4. Take equal parts of juice and sugar. When measured, put the juice on the stove to come to a boil and put the sugar in the oven to heat through, being careful not to scorch it.
5. When both are hot, put in the sugar.
6. Barely cover the seeds and boil, but be careful as the pulp burns to the bottom readily.
7. Squeeze through a cloth and treat the seed juice in the same way as the fruit juice.
8. Do not cook after it jellies.

title: Saratoga Chips
body:
## Ingredients

- potatoes
- ice water
- hot lard
- salt

## Directions

1. Slice potatoes as evenly as possible; drop into ice water.
2. Have a kettle of hot lard; put a few at a time into a towel, shake dry and then drop into the boiling lard.
3. Stir occasionally and when a light brown remove with a skimmer and they will be crisp, not greasy.
4. Sprinkle salt over them while hot.

title: Sardine Sandwiches
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cans sardines
- salt and pepper to taste
- tiny pieces of lettuce or few drops lemon juice

## Directions

1. Take sardines and throw into hot water, having first drained off the oil. A few minutes will free the sardines from grease.
2. Dry in a cloth; scrape off the skin and reduce to a paste, add salt, pepper and tiny pieces of lettuce, which adds to the flavor.
3. Spread between thin slices of bread.
4. Or chop sardines fine and squeeze over them a few drops of lemon juice. Spread on bread or cold biscuit.

title: Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- yolks 3 eggs
- 1 pint of milk
- sugar
- vanilla
- pinch of salt

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs and add milk sweetened to taste, and cook in a dish of hot water
2. When nearly cold add vanilla and a pinch of salt
3. Set on ice to cool

title: Sauce for Bamboo
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup hot milk
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3/4 tablespoon flour
- salt and pepper to taste
- 1 cup water in which bamboo was boiled

## Directions

1. Boil until thick milk, butter, flour, salt and pepper, and one cup of water in which the bamboo was boiled
2. Beat until smooth, then pour over the bamboo and serve hot

title: Scalloped Cabbage
body:
## Ingredients

- cabbage
- cream sauce
- bread blocks
- butter

## Directions

1. Chop any bits of cabbage that are not used, or use left-over stewed cabbage
2. Make a cream sauce and mix with the cabbage
3. Put a layer of bread blocks in the bottom of a baking dish, then a layer of cream cabbage
4. Repeat, having the top layer bread
5. Place bits of butter over the top
6. Bake in a quick oven for twenty minutes

title: Scalloped Corn
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can corn
- 1 pint milk
- cracker crumbs
- butter
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Cover the bottom of buttered baking dish with crackers rolled fine
2. Add layer of corn with bits of butter, salt and pepper
3. Alternate layers of cracker crumbs and corn until material is used up
4. Let the last layer be cracker crumbs with plenty of butter
5. Pour over it one pint of milk
6. Bake one hour

title: Scalloped Eggs
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 eggs
- 2 cups bread crumbs
- 1 cup milk or cream

## Directions

1. Hard boil eggs; slice thin in rings.
2. Place in well buttered baking dish a layer of bread crumbs, then a layer of eggs, etc. Have crumbs on top.
3. Over the whole pour a large cup of cream or milk, and brown nicely in a moderately heated oven.

title: Scalloped Fish in Ramekins
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 medium can fish-flakes
- 2 hard-boiled eggs
- 1/2 onion
- white sauce

## Directions

1. Pick over can of fish-flakes
2. Chop onion and eggs
3. Mix all together with rich white or cream sauce
4. Bake in ramekins
5. Dust top of each with buttered bread or cracker crumbs

title: Scalloped Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- 8 or 10 good sized onions
- milk or cream
- bread crumbs
- butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Take onions, slice and boil until tender.
2. Cover bottom of buttered baking dish with onions.
3. Add layer of bread crumbs with bits of butter, pepper and salt.
4. Add more onions and more bread crumbs until dish is almost full.
5. Add milk and cream until full.
6. Bake twenty minutes or half an hour.

title: Scalloped Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- raw potatoes
- salt and pepper
- hot milk
- flour
- 1 onion
- butter

## Directions

1. Peel and slice raw potatoes thin.
2. Butter a deep dish.
3. Put in a layer of potatoes; season with salt, pepper and butter, also onion if liked.
4. Sprinkle in a little flour.
5. Add another layer of potato and seasoning, and so proceed until the dish is filled.
6. Pour over enough hot milk to cover.
7. Put into oven and bake until tender, about three-fourths of an hour.

title: Scalloped Steak
body:
## Ingredients

- beefsteak
- potatoes
- onions
- butter
- stock or water
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Alternate layers of steak chopped fine with layers of potatoes and onions.
2. Season each layer and add a piece of butter.
3. Over all pour stock or water.
4. Bake.

title: Sea Foam Kisses
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 1/2 cup water
- 1 teaspoon mapleine
- 1 egg white

## Directions

1. Boil together until they begin to hair.
2. Cool a little.
3. Beat white of one egg stiff and add gradually to syrup.
4. Beat all together until ready to drop on waxed paper.

title: Shirred Eggs in Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs
- 6 small solid tomatoes
- 6 tablespoon cream sauce
- 6 slices toast

## Directions

1. Peel small solid tomatoes and scoop out centers.
2. Break an egg into each tomato; stand them in a baking dish, and bake slowly ten or fifteen minutes until the eggs are set.
3. Add a tablespoon of cream sauce to each and serve on slices of toast.

title: Snow Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 tablespoons corn starch
- 1 1/2 cups boiling water
- 1 lemon
- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- whites 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Dissolve cornstarch in boiling water, add lemon juice and sugar, and boil in double boiler twenty minutes
2. When perfectly cold beat in the stiffly beaten whites of eggs and continue to beat ten minutes
3. Serve with any desired sauce

title: Somerset Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- green peppers
- cucumber
- lettuce
- french dressing

## Directions

1. Peel medium sized tomatoes and chill.
2. Cut in halves crosswise.
3. For each portion arrange one-half tomato on a nest of lettuce leaves and garnish top of each with slice of cucumber (fluted edges) and a smaller slice of green pepper.
4. Serve with French dressing.

title: Sorbete Favorita
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can plums (juice)
- 2 tablespoons cornstarch
- 4 cups boiling water
- 2 cups sugar
- whites 3 eggs

## Directions

1. Mix juice from can of plums with water, sugar, cornstarch mixed with a little water and freeze; when half frozen add egg whites stiffly beaten

title: Sour Cream Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 1 cup sour cream
- 1 teaspoon soda
- one tablespoon vinegar

## Directions

1. Sour the cream by adding one tablespoon vinegar to each cup of cream.
2. Mix soft; roll thin; sift granulated sugar over and roll gently in.
3. Cut and bake.

title: Spiced Camias
body:
## Ingredients

- 7 pounds fruit
- 5 pounds brown sugar
- 3 tablespoons cinnamon
- 3 tablespoons cloves
- 1 pint vinegar

## Directions

1. Clean fruit, cut stem ends, put in preserving kettle.
2. Add sugar, vinegar and spices tied in bag.
3. Heat to boiling point and cook slowly until fruit is dark reddish brown in color and the juice thick.

title: Spiced Mangoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 cups mangoes
- 4 cups sugar
- 2 cups vinegar
- 1 tablespoon cinnamon
- 1 tablespoon cloves

## Directions

1. Tie cinnamon and cloves in a thin cotton cloth.
2. Boil them in vinegar and sugar until it becomes a syrup.
3. Peel the mangoes and cut the meat from the seeds in lengthwise strips.
4. Drop into syrup and boil ten minutes.
5. Place in cooker two hours.
6. Then put in cans.

title: Spiced Prunes
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 pint prunes
- 1 cup cider vinegar
- 2 cups sugar
- clove and cinnamon to taste

## Directions

1. Wash prunes and soak over night in water enough to cover well.
2. Stew until the skins are soft, then pour off the water, and add vinegar, cloves and cinnamon to suit taste.

title: Spinach
body:
## Ingredients

- spinach
- butter
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Do not cover while cooking.
2. Pick over carefully, and wash through several waters; drain and put into boiling water.
3. Fifteen to twenty minutes are generally enough to boil spinach.
4. Be careful to remove the scum.
5. When quite tender, drain and squeeze well; chop fine and put into pan with a piece of butter, salt and pepper.
6. Stew five minutes, stirring all the time until quite dry.
7. Turn into dish, shape into a mould and serve with hard-boiled eggs over the top.

title: Spinach and Egg
body:
## Ingredients

- eggs
- cooked spinach

## Directions

1. Hard boil eggs, cut lid off the tops, take out yolks, stuff with boiled spinach.
2. Press yolk through sieve, and dust over the top.
3. Serve.

title: Sponge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 eggs, beaten separately
- 1 3/4 cups sugar
- 1 1/2 cups flour (after sifting)
- 1/3 teaspoon cream of tartar
- pinch of salt
- 1 lemon or orange (juice and rind for flavoring)

## Directions

1. Beat eggs separately, add sugar, cream of tartar, salt, and flour. Flavor with lemon or orange juice and rind.

title: Sponge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon water
- 1 cup flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat eggs very light, add sugar and beat.
2. Add water, and flour with baking powder sifted into it.

title: Sponge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 cup flour
- 3/4 cup hot milk
- 2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs five minutes by the clock, add sugar one tablespoon at a time and continue beating.
2. Add the hot milk with the butter melted in it.
3. Sift flour three times; add baking powder at last sifting and use any flavor desired.
4. This batter may seem too thin, but if recipe is followed strictly, a delicious cake will be the result.

title: Sponge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 3/4 cup hot milk
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 2 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Beat the eggs five minutes by the clock
2. Add sugar one tablespoon at a time and continue beating
3. Add the hot milk with the butter melted in it
4. Sift flour three times
5. Add baking powder at last sifting and use any flavor desired
6. Note: This batter may seem too thin, but if recipe is followed strictly, a delicious cake will be the result

title: Steam Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups grated raw potato
- 1 teaspoon soda
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 cup flour
- 1 cup raisins
- 1 cup walnuts
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 1 teaspoon cinnamon
- 1/2 teaspoon cloves
- 1 nutmeg, grated

## Directions

1. Grate potato and add soda
2. Let stand a few minutes
3. Mix other ingredients and add
4. Steam three hours
5. Serve with coconut sauce

title: Steamed And Baked Prunes
body:
## Ingredients

- California prunes
- cold water
- sugar
- cream

## Directions

1. Take a quantity of California prunes, pour scalding water over them, then wash in cold water
2. Add cold water enough to cover them
3. Cover closely and cook slowly until tender
4. If rich syrup is desired uncover and boil briskly
5. Turn into a baking pan, sprinkle a little sugar over the top and bake a few minutes
6. Serve with cream

title: Steamed Brown Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup corn meal
- ¾ cup flour
- ½ teaspoon soda
- 1 cup sour milk
- ½ cup molasses
- ¼ teaspoon salt

## Directions

1. Sift meal, flour, soda and salt together; add the sour milk and molasses.
2. Steam three hours if cooked in one loaf.

title: Steamed Puffs
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 cup sugar
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 cup butter
- 3/4 cup milk
- 1 teaspoon baking powder
- flour
- fruit
- 1 cup fruit juice
- 2 teaspoons corn starch
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1 teaspoon butter

## Directions

1. Take sugar, eggs, butter, milk, baking powder and enough flour to make thick batter
2. Grease as many cups as you desire puffs
3. Fill each one about one quarter full
4. Add any desired fruit
5. Put in another spoonful batter
6. Steam forty-five minutes
7. Serve hot with any good pudding sauce or a sauce made from fruit juice

title: Steamed Salmon
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can salmon
- 1 tablespoon butter
- 3 eggs
- 1/2 cupful cracker crumbs
- salt, pepper and parsley
- oil from can salmon
- 1/2 cup water
- 1 teaspoon catsup
- 1 teaspoon corn starch

## Directions

1. Remove bones and skin from salmon and rub butter into it.
2. Beat up eggs and mix with salmon.
3. Add cracker crumbs with salt, pepper and parsley.
4. Pack in buttered mould and steam one hour.
5. Cook until thick the oil drained from salmon, one-half cup water, the catsup and corn starch.
6. Serve hot.

title: Stewed Carrots
body:
## Ingredients

- carrots
- 2 tablespoons butter
- salt and pepper
- flour
- milk
- water

## Directions

1. Wash and scrape the carrots and divide them into strips
2. Place in water enough to cover them
3. Add a spoon of salt
4. Boil slowly until tender
5. Drain and replace in pan, with two tablespoons of butter rolled in flour, salt and pepper
6. Add enough milk to moisten the whole
7. Let it come to a boil and serve hot

title: Stewed Onions
body:
## Ingredients

- onions
- salt and pepper to taste
- 1 cup milk
- 1 tablespoon flour
- butter size of an egg

## Directions

1. Cook as boiled onions; drain.
2. Add milk, butter, pepper and salt, flour stirred to a cream.
3. Let all boil up at once.
4. Serve.

title: Strawberry Frappe
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can Cross and Blackwell strawberry jam
- 1 quart boiling water
- 2 teaspoons lemon juice
- whites 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Pour boiling water over contents of one can of strawberry jam (any other flavor if preferred)
2. When cool, add lemon juice and freeze
3. When almost frozen add well beaten whites of two eggs

title: Strawberry Shortcake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 box Baguio strawberries
- 1 pint flour
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1 heaping teaspoon baking powder
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 3/4 tablespoon butter
- cold milk

## Directions

1. Select firm clean berries
2. Wash in boiled or distilled water
3. Place in colander and deluge with boiling water quickly
4. Turn out on platter or flat dish
5. Mash, sweeten to taste and put on ice
6. Add salt, baking powder and sugar to flour
7. Mix thoroughly
8. Rub in butter and wet to a soft dough with cold milk
9. Roll out like biscuit
10. Spread lightly with butter
11. Fold once
12. Bake
13. Unfold
14. Spread mashed berries between layers and on top

title: String Bean Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- string beans
- French dressing

## Directions

1. Select young, tender beans; string and cut each one in three pieces lengthwise.
2. Cover with boiling salted water; boil twenty minutes and drain.
3. Throw them into cold water for ten minutes.
4. Then put them in boiling unsalted water, and cook for fifteen minutes longer.
5. Drain and cool.
6. Arrange them neatly on a small platter; cover with French dressing.

title: Stuffed Eggplant
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 eggplant
- minced ham
- 1/4 minced onion
- 2 tablespoons grated crumbs
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt and pepper to taste
- water

## Directions

1. Cut eggplant in two
2. Scrape out all the inside and put it in a saucepan with a little minced ham
3. Cover with water and boil until soft
4. Drain
5. Add crumbs, butter, onion, salt and pepper
6. Stuff each half of the eggplant

title: Stuffed Eggplant
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 eggplant
- minced ham
- 3/4 minced onion
- 2 tablespoons grated crumbs
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt and pepper to taste

## Directions

1. Cut eggplant in two; scrape out all the inside and put it in a saucepan with a little minced ham.
2. Cover with water and boil until soft; drain.
3. Add crumbs, butter, onion, salt and pepper; stuff each half of the hull.
4. Add a small lump of butter to each and bake fifteen minutes.

title: Stuffed Eggplant
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 eggplant
- 3/4 cup nuts
- 3/4 cup bread crumbs
- 3/4 teaspoon salt
- 1/4 small onion
- pinch of parsley
- butter

## Directions

1. Put the whole egg-plant into boiling water; boil twenty minutes or until tender.
2. Cut in two and scoop out the center, leaving a wall one-half inch thick.
3. Chop the center, mixing it with bread crumbs, nuts, salt, parsley and a little onion.
4. Stuff the eggplant and bake in a moderate oven for about an hour, basting a few times with butter.

title: Stuffed Pineapple
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large pineapple
- 1 dozen Maraschino cherries
- orange
- bananas
- 4 teaspoons Maraschino liquor

## Directions

1. Select a fine large pineapple and cut the top off smoothly
2. Scoop out the inside, taking care not to break the sides; cut the pulp into dice and put with it half as much orange; also cut as much banana as you have orange and cherries each halved; add liquor and mix
3. Return all to the pineapple shell; set this in a very cold place and leave until well chilled
4. If possible put stuffed pineapple into a pail and pack in ice and salt for an hour
5. Place the top, with its tuft of leaves, on the stuffed pineapple when it is sent to the table

title: Stuffed Potatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 large potatoes
- 1 pint chopped meat
- 1 tablespoon grated onion
- salt and pepper
- 1 tablespoon grated parsley
- 1/2 cup stock
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Wash potatoes and cut them in halves crosswise.
2. With a scoop take out the centers leaving a wall at least half an inch thick.
3. Bake these shells in a hot oven twenty minutes.
4. Chop sufficient meat to make a pint; add salt, pepper, onion, parsley.
5. Add sufficient stock to make the mixture moist (about 3/4 cup).
6. Remove the potatoes from the oven; fill with this mixture, rounding it up.
7. Dust with bread crumbs and bake until brown.

title: Stuffed Prunes
body:
## Ingredients

- prunes
- powdered sugar
- chopped walnuts
- dates

## Directions

1. Soak the prunes in water about an hour.
2. Pit them and fill each prune with one fourth teaspoon powdered sugar, some nicely chopped walnuts and half a date.
3. Shape the prunes nicely and sprinkle with sugar.

title: Stuffed Steak
body:
## Ingredients

- round steak
- 2 cups dry bread
- 1 1/2 cup boiling water
- 1 teaspoon butter
- 1/2 teaspoon mixed herbs
- 1 egg yolk
- salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Make stuffing by pouring over bread 1/2 cup boiling water; mash; add butter, herbs, yolk of egg; beat together; salt and pepper; put in steak.
2. Put in pot to brown as for pot roast; add one cup boiling water; let it simmer one and one half hours.
3. Then roast in oven one half hour.

title: Stuffed Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- 1 pint bread crumbs
- 1 tablespoon chopped parsley
- 1 tablespoon grated onion
- 1 level teaspoon salt
- pepper to taste
- 2 tablespoons melted butter

## Directions

1. Cut off a slice from the stem end of the tomatoes; scoop out seeds and a portion of hard centers.
2. Mix bread crumbs, parsley, onion, salt, pepper and butter; stuff into tomatoes, heaping slightly.
3. Stand them in a baking pan; add half a cupful of water and bake in a slow oven for three quarters of an hour, basting once or twice with a little melted butter.

title: Stuffed Tomatoes
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 large solid tomatoes
- 3/4 cup rice
- 1/2 pint pecan nuts
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- bread crumbs
- salt

## Directions

1. Cut tomatoes into halves.
2. Scoop out the centers and seeds.
3. Boil rice twenty minutes; drain and add nuts, salt and onion juice.
4. Mix and stuff into tomatoes.
5. Dust the tops with bread crumbs and bake very slowly for an hour.
6. Do not allow them to cook to pieces.
7. Serve with brown sauce made in the pan.

title: Suet Pudding
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup suet, chopped
- 1 cup molasses
- 1 cup milk
- 1 cup raisins seeded
- 2 cups graham flour
- 1 cup wheat flour
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Mix ingredients
2. Steam three hours

title: Sugar Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1/3 cup sweet milk
- 1 scant teaspoon baking powder
- 4 eggs
- flour enough to roll

## Directions

1. Beat eggs very light, add sugar, beat again, add butter melted and sweet milk.
2. Have flour and baking powder in bowl, pour the above mixture in the middle and mix in gradually with a spoon.
3. Roll on a well floured cloth until very thin, sprinkle with granulated sugar, pass roller over lightly and cut.
4. Bake in a moderately quick oven.

title: Susan B. Anthony Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup sugar
- 1/3 cup butter
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 2/3 cups milk
- 2 1/3 cups flour
- 2 eggs

## Directions

1. Cream sugar and butter with the yolks of eggs
2. Add milk and well sifted flour
3. After the other ingredients have been well stirred, sift baking powder into batter
4. Lastly, fold in the stiffly beaten whites
5. Bake in loaf, flavor to taste

title: Tapioca Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup tapioca
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 1 quart water
- 1 pint canned peaches

## Directions

1. Soak tapioca in cold water two hours
2. Add sugar
3. Put peaches in a two quart pudding dish pour the tapioca over, cover securely and bake forty minutes

title: Tapioca Custard
body:
## Ingredients

- 3/4 cup tapioca
- 2 eggs
- 3/4 can sweet condensed milk
- 1 teaspoon vanilla
- 2 1/2 cups cold water

## Directions

1. Boil tapioca twenty minutes with two cups of water
2. Beat the eggs with the milk which has been dissolved in half cup of water, and add to the boiling tapioca
3. Cook together a few minutes until thick and smooth
4. Add flavoring when done

title: The Lanca (Bread Fruit)
body:
## Ingredients

- lanca seeds
- salt
- butter
- vinegar

## Directions

1. Take the fleshy covering from the lanca seeds and boil forty or fifty minutes.
2. Put on in boiling water.
3. Season with salt and butter before serving.
4. This is a good substitute for cabbage and tastes much like it if eaten with a little vinegar.

title: To Boil Rice
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup rice
- salt

## Directions

1. Pick over the rice carefully; wash it in warm water, rubbing it between the hands and rinse in several waters; then let it remain in cold water until ready to be cooked.
2. Have saucepan of water, slightly salted; when boiling hard, sprinkle rice into water by degrees to keep particles separated.
3. Boil steadily for twenty minutes; take from fire; drain.
4. Place the pan, with lid off, on the back of the stove, where it is only moderately warm, to allow the rice to dry.
5. Each grain will be separate.

title: To Make Tough Meat Tender
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 large onion
- ⅓ cup vinegar
- ½ pound bacon or pork
- ⅔ cup water
- salt
- pepper
- butter
- flour

## Directions

1. Place in the bottom of kettle, slices of onion and thin slices of bacon and pork.
2. Pound the meat well, sprinkling it with salt and plenty of pepper.
3. Lay on onions and bacon.
4. Cover closely and cook until brown on both sides.
5. Add water and vinegar.
6. Keep closely covered and cook until tender, one and a half to two hours.
7. When first placed in kettle, spread butter over the meat.
8. After removing the meat, add a little water and thicken slightly with flour.

title: Tomato and Cheese Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- tomatoes
- red peppers
- cream cheese
- French dressing

## Directions

1. Peel the tomatoes after scalding them and slice thickly.
2. Wipe each slice dry and cover with a layer of cream cheese mixed with chopped red pepper and garnished with small rounds of the pepper.
3. Serve with French dressing.

title: Tomato and Mushroom Salad
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 tomatoes
- 1 onion
- 1 cup mushrooms
- 3/4 cup celery tops
- mayonnaise
- lettuce

## Directions

1. Scald tomatoes and chill.
2. Mince onion, chop mushrooms and celery, moisten with mayonnaise.
3. Cut a slice off the top of the tomatoes, take out seeds and fill with mixture.
4. Put mayonnaise on top and serve on lettuce.

title: Tomato Fig
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 pounds green tomatoes
- 3 pounds brown sugar
- 1.5 cups vinegar
- 0.5 pound raisins

## Directions

1. Pare the tomatoes and boil two minutes in salt and water.
2. Drain in colander.
3. Add raisins and vinegar, cook slowly until thoroughly done.
4. Add sugar when nearly done.

title: Tomato Jelly
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 slice onion
- 3 cloves
- 1/2 teaspoon thyme
- 1 bay leaf
- 1 teaspoon salt
- 1/4 box gelatine
- 1 teaspoon sugar
- mayonnaise
- 3/4 teaspoon pepper

## Directions

1. Boil tomatoes and spices together.
2. When done strain and add gelatine which has been soaked in one half cup water.
3. Place on ice and serve with mayonnaise.

title: Tomato Omelet
body:
## Ingredients

- 4 eggs
- 1/2 cup chopped tomato
- 1 tablespoon butter
- salt to taste
- dash of cayenne pepper

## Directions

1. Beat eggs without separating until well mixed.
2. Add tomato, salt and cayenne.
3. Put butter into omelet pan; when hot add egg mixture; shake until set; fold and turn the omelet out on a platter.

title: Tomato Sauce
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart tomatoes
- 1 ounce butter
- 1 slice onion
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 2 cloves
- pepper and salt

## Directions

1. Boil together for twenty minutes tomatoes, onions, cloves, salt and pepper.
2. Strain through a sieve.
3. Melt butter in another pan.
4. As it melts, stir in flour until mixture browns and froths a little.
5. Mix the tomato pulp with it, and it is ready for the table.

title: Tomato Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 12 tomatoes
- 2 teaspoons sugar
- 1/4 teaspoon soda
- 4 cups gingetan
- 5 tablespoons flour
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1½ teaspoons salt
- 3/8 teaspoon pepper

## Directions

1. Place tomatoes in boiling water.
2. Remove skins.
3. Cook them for fifteen minutes, with sugar and soda.
4. Run through a sieve.
5. Mix the gingetan (obtained by pouring hot water through grated coconut) and flour well together.
6. Heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
7. Add butter, salt and pepper.
8. Combine the mixtures and reheat.

title: Tomato Soup
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 quart stewed tomatoes
- 1 medium size onion
- butter size of an egg
- ½ teaspoon soda
- 1 quart milk
- 1 cup cooked rice

## Directions

1. Slice onion.
2. Fry in butter until it begins to brown.
3. Add tomatoes and stir together.
4. Cook until onion is thoroughly done.
5. Strain.
6. Add soda, then milk.
7. Let it boil up and serve.

title: Tomatoes - French Fashion
body:
## Ingredients

- 6 small solid tomatoes
- 3/4 pint milk
- 1 rounding tablespoon butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- salt and pepper to taste
- bread crumbs

## Directions

1. Scald and peel small solid tomatoes.
2. To each six, allow cream sauce made by rubbing together butter and flour.
3. Add milk, stir until boiling, season with salt and pepper.
4. Put a tablespoon of sauce in the bottom of a custard cup; put in a tomato and cover with another tablespoon sauce; dust top with bread crumbs.
5. Stand the cups in a pan of boiling water and bake in moderate oven for half an hour.
6. Serve in the cups.

title: Tongue or Ham on Toast
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup minced tongue or ham
- 2 egg yolks
- buttered toast

## Directions

1. Stir eggs over fire until creamy.
2. Serve on buttered toast.

title: Turkey Patties
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 cup cold turkey
- 1 cup cream
- 3 tablespoons flour
- 3 tablespoons butter
- 1 pint oysters
- salt and pepper
- patty shells

## Directions

1. Mix butter and flour.
2. Add the cream, salt and pepper, and cook until thick.
3. Add turkey and let simmer five minutes.
4. Stir in oysters and cook until they are plump.
5. Fill patty shells and serve.

title: Tutti Fruitti Icing
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 ounce chopped citron
- 1 ounce candied cherries
- 1 ounce seedless raisins
- 1 ounce candied pineapple
- 1 ounce blanched almonds

## Directions

1. Mix with boiled icing.

title: Tutti Frutti Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- plain unflavored ice cream
- minced fruits in syrup
- chopped walnut meats
- pineapples, bananas, oranges, peaches or berries

## Directions

1. Serve plain unflavored ice cream in deep glasses
2. Pour over each a combination of minced fruits in syrup
3. Top with a tablespoon of chopped walnut meats

title: Vanilla Ice Cream
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 can cream
- 4 eggs
- 2 cans hot water
- 1½ cups sugar
- 1 tablespoon cornstarch
- vanilla

## Directions

1. Add hot water to cream, place in fire and when it boils, add cornstarch dissolved in a little water; after stirring briskly let it boil; then add the yolks of eggs, beaten well with the sugar
2. Place to cool and flavor with vanilla

title: Veal Loaf
body:
## Ingredients

- 1½ pounds veal
- 1¼ pounds pork
- 2 eggs
- ¾ cup cream
- 3 crackers
- salt to taste
- pinch of sage
- little onion

## Directions

1. Put veal and pork through food chopper.
2. Add eggs, cream, cracker crumbs, little onion, salt, and sage.
3. Mould into a loaf and bake.

title: Velvet Sponge Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups flour
- 4 eggs
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 1/2 teaspoons baking powder
- 3/4 cup boiling water
- 1/2 lemon

## Directions

1. Beat yolks of eggs
2. Add sugar and beat fifteen minutes
3. Flavor with vanilla and the juice and grated rind of half a lemon, pinch of salt
4. Add two beaten whites, flour and baking powder just before the boiling water and flavoring
5. Bake in pan one foot square
6. Cover with boiled icing
7. Place half nuts on top and cut in squares

title: Victory Steak Curry
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound victory steak
- 1 green mongo
- 1 small onion
- 3 small green peppers
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 3/4 cup cream
- 3/4 tablespoon flour
- 1 tablespoon curry powder

## Directions

1. Take the steak and roll in balls size of hickory nuts.
2. Pour sufficient hot water over to cover and simmer for half hour.
3. Slice onion fine, fry in butter till rich brown.
4. Take curry powder and flour, mix and put into hot butter.
5. Take the meat balls from liquid and fry in curry for a few minutes, then add liquid.
6. A few slices of green mongo stewed in the curry is nice.
7. If you like a hotter curry, two or three small green peppers may be added.
8. After all liquid let simmer few minutes.
9. A half cup cream added just before removing from fire makes a richer curry.

title: Villa Wafers
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/3 cup butter
- 1 cup sugar
- 1 egg
- 3/4 cup milk
- 2 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 2 teaspoons vanilla

## Directions

1. Cream the butter, add sugar, egg well beaten, milk and vanilla.
2. Mix and sift dry ingredients and add to first mixture.
3. Chill thoroughly, roll as thin as possible on floured board, place near together on buttered sheet and bake in moderate oven.

title: Vinegar Pie
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 egg
- 1 tablespoon sharp vinegar
- 1 heaping tablespoon flour
- 1 teacup cold water
- 1 teacup sugar
- nutmeg

## Directions

1. Beat well together egg, flour and sugar
2. add vinegar and water
3. flavor with nutmeg and bake with two crusts

title: Waffles
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups milk
- 3 eggs
- ½ teaspoon salt
- ¾ cup butter and lard mixed
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- flour

## Directions

1. Beat egg whites and yolks separately
2. Melt butter and lard
3. Take milk, beaten egg yolks, melted butter and lard mixed, baking powder, and flour enough to make a batter as stiff as pancake batter
4. Add baking powder and the whites of eggs the last thing before cooking

title: Waffles
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 eggs
- ¾ cup water
- 1 tablespoon sugar
- 1 cup flour
- ¾ teaspoon salt
- 1 teaspoon baking powder

## Directions

1. Combine ingredients to make enough batter for two round waffles

title: Walnut Layer Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- walnuts
- cake batter
- boiled icing

## Directions

1. Chop nuts fine and mix small cupful with cake batter
2. Put boiled icing between layers, and sprinkle thickly with chopped nuts
3. Around the top place halves of nuts on icing

title: War Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups brown sugar
- 2 cups water
- 2 tablespoons coconut oil or any melted shortening
- 2 cups raisins
- 3 cups flour
- 1 heaping teaspoon soda
- 1 heaping teaspoon salt
- 1 level teaspoon cloves
- 1 level teaspoon cinnamon
- 1 level teaspoon nutmeg

## Directions

1. Boil sugar, water, shortening and raisins together for five minutes
2. When cool add flour, salt, soda and spices, sifted together
3. Bake in sheet in moderate oven

title: Welsh Rarebit
body:
## Ingredients

- 3 ounces grated dry cheese
- 2 egg yolks
- 4 ounces grated bread
- 3 ounces butter
- 1 dessert spoon made mustard
- pinch of salt and pepper

## Directions

1. Mix cheese with the yolks of eggs
2. add the grated bread and butter and seasoning
3. Toast slices of bread cut thin into shapes
4. spread the paste thick upon them and put in oven
5. Let them become hot and slightly browned
6. Serve hot

title: White Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 1 1/2 cups sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup water
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 6 eggs
- 4 teaspoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Cream sugar and butter thoroughly
2. Add one cup flour, stir thoroughly and add the rest of the flour and water, alternately
3. Then stir in the whites of eggs, well beaten
4. Stir all three minutes and bake in three layers
5. Filling: Boil two cups sugar and one-half cup water until it threads and pour over stiffly beaten whites of four eggs

title: White Cookies
body:
## Ingredients

- 5 eggs
- 1 cup butter
- 5 cups flour
- 2 teaspoons baking powder
- 2 1/2 cups sugar
- 3/4 teaspoon vanilla
- 3/4 teaspoon lemon extract

## Directions

1. Cream the butter and sugar; beat yolks and whites of eggs separately.
2. All the ingredients must be fresh and of the best.
3. Keep mixture cool until placed in oven.

title: White Fish in Pimiento Cases
body:
## Ingredients

- 1/2 pound of white fish or halibut
- dash of cayenne pepper
- 1 teaspoon onion juice
- whites of 4 eggs
- pimientos
- 1 egg yolk
- 1/2 cup shrimps
- 1 saltspoon salt
- pepper
- 2 tablespoons butter
- 1 tablespoon flour
- 1 cup hot water
- 1 tablespoon lemon juice

## Directions

1. Cook white fish, or halibut, in salted water, then drain and rub through a sieve.
2. Season with a few grains of cayenne pepper and lemon juice, then add cream sauce.
3. Blend thoroughly, and fold in the beaten whites of eggs.
4. Butter individual moulds and line with pimientos.
5. Fill with the mixture, and stand moulds in pan of hot water.
6. Cover tops with buttered paper, and bake in a moderate oven for twenty minutes.
7. Unmould on a hot platter.
8. Garnish with parsley and serve with shrimp sauce.
9. Melt butter, add flour, and gradually hot water.
10. Stir and cook until smooth.
11. Season with salt, a dash of pepper, lemon juice.
12. Add the yolk of an egg and reheat.
13. Stir in shrimps, mashed and cut into pieces.

title: White Mountain Cake
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 cups sugar
- 3/4 cup butter
- 1 cup milk
- 4 eggs
- 2 1/2 cups flour
- 2 tablespoons baking powder

## Directions

1. Cream sugar and butter
2. Add milk, flour and baking powder
3. Have whites of eggs well beaten and fold in batter
4. Bake in layers or loaf. A little more flour is used for loaf

title: Yeast Bread
body:
## Ingredients

- 2 medium sized potatoes
- 4½ cups water
- 2 teaspoons salt
- 4 tablespoons sugar
- 4 tablespoons lard
- 2 cups boiling water
- flour
- potato yeast

## Directions

1. In the evening, boil two potatoes of medium size in four and a half cups of water.
2. Take the potatoes from the water, mash them fine, and return them to the potato water.
3. To the potato water add two teaspoons of salt and four level tablespoons of sugar.
4. When the mixture is lukewarm add the potato yeast.
5. Cover it and set it aside until morning, when it should be light and foamy.
6. In the morning put four tablespoons of sugar and four tablespoons of lard into a large mixing bowl and pour over the ingredients two cups of boiling water.
7. When this liquid has cooled to lukewarm, stir the potato yeast into it, reserving about one and one-fourth cups for a start for the next baking.
8. Stir into the liquid enough sifted flour to make a stiff sponge and beat it well.
9. Cover this sponge and set it in a warm place.
10. When it is light, which should be in about one hour, stir into it enough sifted flour to knead.
11. Knead this dough for about twenty minutes, return it to the mixing bowl and set it in a warm place to rise.
12. When it has doubled in size, which should be in about one hour, mould into loaves or rolls and put into greased pans.
13. Cover and set aside to rise.
14. When the dough has again doubled in size, put into a well regulated oven and bake.
